pages.text:
The World of Mistborn — What Your Character Knows

This section explains the context of the world you'll be playing in. You don't need to read the books: everything you need is here. What follows is common knowledge for any inhabitant of this world.

The Final Empire
The world is ruled by a single empire that spans all known territory. There are no other countries, no rival nations. Only the Final Empire exists, and at its center stands the Lord Ruler.

No one remembers a time before him. According to the official religion, the Lord Ruler is a living god who saved the world a thousand years ago by defeating a threat known as the Deepness. In exchange for that salvation, he claimed absolute dominion over all of humanity. He has ruled for a thousand years without interruption, immortal and invincible.

His will is enforced through three arms:
- The Obligators: a religious-bureaucratic order that controls contracts, commerce, records, and faith. They are everywhere. A business deal is not legal without an Obligator as witness. They also ensure no one questions the Lord Ruler.
- The Steel Inquisitors: the empire's most feared weapons. Terrifying creatures with metal spikes driven through their eyes. They are brutally powerful, nearly impossible to kill, and answer only to the Lord Ruler. If an Inquisitor comes for you, you don't fight — you run.
- The Guard and garrisons: the conventional military force that patrols cities and maintains order.

Society: Nobles and Skaa
Society is divided into two rigid classes:

Nobles are the privileged class. They control industry, politics, and resources. They live in mansions, attend balls, and run the noble houses — powerful families that compete among themselves for influence, contracts, and territory. Although they are privileged, not all nobles are rich; there are lesser houses that barely survive. What all nobles share is bloodline: the possibility that one of their children might be born an Allomancer.

Skaa are the oppressed class. They work in factories, mines, fields, and plantations. They have no formal rights. The law gives them little to no protection. They live in overcrowded neighborhoods, eat what they can, and obey the nobles who employ them. Skaa are not permitted to carry weapons, and killing a skaa rarely has legal consequences for a noble. Despite everything, the skaa have their own culture, their underground networks, their crews, and their codes of survival.

Mixing between nobles and skaa is forbidden by law. However, it happens. And when it does, sometimes a child is born with noble blood... and with the potential to be an Allomancer. Those half-breed children, if discovered, are eliminated by order of the Lord Ruler. That's why many skaa Allomancers live with the secret, or simply don't know what they are until a metal awakens them.

Allomancy — The Power of Metals
Allomancy is the magic system of this world. An Allomancer is a person who can ingest certain metals and burn them inside their body to produce superhuman effects. Not everyone can do this: you are born an Allomancer, and it is tied to noble bloodline heritage (though it also appears secretly in half-skaa).

Each Allomancer burns a single metal. The type of metal determines what power they have:
- Pewter (Pewter Brute): superhuman strength and physical endurance. The group's tank.
- Steel (Steel Marksman): pushes metallic objects away from the body — coins as projectiles, propelled jumps, barriers. Ranged control.
- Iron (Iron Puller): pulls metallic objects toward oneself — disarming, grabbing objects, anchored movement to structures.
- Tin (Tin Lurcher): hyperenhanced senses — sight, hearing, smell, touch. The perfect scout.
- Zinc (Embaucador): inflames others' emotions — rage, fear, passion. Offensive manipulation.
- Brass (Embaucador): soothes others' emotions — apathy, submission, calm. Subtle manipulation.
- Copper (Copper Smoker): hides the group's Allomantic pulses. A vital anti-detection shield for operating in secret.
- Bronze (Bronze Seeker): detects nearby Allomancy use through pulses. The team's radar.

To use their powers, an Allomancer needs to ingest the metal (usually dissolved in an alcohol vial) and then burn it mentally. Reserves are limited: when they run out, more metal must be consumed. Burning too much has physical consequences.

In the world of Mistborn, most Allomancers burn a single metal. They are called Mistings. But legends exist of people who could burn all metals at once. Those people were called Mistborn. Whether they exist today, no one knows for certain.

Allomancy is a valuable and dangerous resource. Noble houses use it as a weapon in their political wars. And for the skaa, having an Allomancer in the crew can mean the difference between survival and death.

The Mists and the Ash
Two phenomena define the landscape of this world:

Ash falls constantly from the sky. There is no visible volcano, but the ash is always there, covering streets, rooftops, and crops. Sweeping the ash is a daily chore. The sky is perpetual gray, and the sun is red behind the haze.

The mists appear every night. A dense, supernatural fog envelops everything when the sun sets. Common people fear them: they close doors and windows at nightfall. Nobles and their servants avoid going out. Only the brave, the desperate, and the Allomancers walk among the mists. For an Allomancer, the fog is an ally: it hides movement, covers escapes, and provides a natural tactical advantage.

Fellise
Fellise is the city where the campaign takes place. It is a medium-sized industrial city, far from the empire's capital (Luthadel), but large enough to have its own network of noble houses, skaa neighborhoods, factories, warehouses, sewers, and an underground zone that few know about.

Fellise has its own Obligators, its own garrison, and its own internal political dynamics: noble houses that conspire, merchants seeking advantage, skaa crews operating in the shadows, and secrets buried beneath the ash.

It is a city where everyone lies, where information is currency, and where a group with the right skills can shift the balance of power — if they survive long enough.

What You Need to Know to Play
- The Lord Ruler governs everything. Questioning him is heresy. But he is not in Fellise: his Obligators and Inquisitors act in his name.
- Nobles have power and the skaa do not. You are probably on the side of those who don't.
- Allomancy is your most powerful tool, but using it in public can attract the Inquisitors.
- The mists and the ash are part of daily life. The night belongs to the fog, and the fog belongs to those who dare walk in it.
- Fellise has secrets. Many. Discovering them is part of the game.

Player's Guide
Welcome to Shadows over Fellise, a tabletop role-playing game (RPG) set in a world of dark and industrial fantasy.

What is a role-playing game?
A player takes on the role of Game Master (DM): narrates the world, plays the characters non-player (NPCs) and presents challenges. The other players create one character each and describe what they do. When the outcome of an action is uncertain, dice are rolled to resolve it.

You don't need to know the Mistborn novels to play. Everything you need is in this manual.

The world in a nutshell
Fellise is an industrial city shrouded in perpetual mist. Society is divided between nobles and skaa (the oppressed working class). Some people are born with a power called Allomancy: by ingesting and "quemar" certain metals, they gain extraordinary abilities. Each metal grants a different effect: superhuman strength, heightened senses, emotion control, manipulation of metallic objects, pulse detection and more.

Your character is part of a crew operating on the margins of the law. You'll need to investigate, plan, negotiate, infiltrate, and fight to survive.

What kind of game is this?
- Dark, urban, and criminal: you start as part of a crew in a hostile city.
- Investigation + combat + decisiones: not everything is solved by fighting.
- You can observe, negotiate, plan, flee, sabotage, and help. Improvising is always valid.
- Some characters use metals to perform extraordinary feats; others shine through their craft, contacts, and cunning.

Possible actions (quick reference for new players)
Action
What it means
Suggested roll
Observe / Search
Clues, traps, routes, unusual details
Perception (WIS) or Investigation (INT)
Talk / Negotiate
Persuade, lie, intimidate, calm
Persuasion / Deception / Intimidation (CHA)
Plan / Help
Give advantage to an ally, provide cover, set up ambush
Depends on the idea (INT, WIS or tool)
Stealth
Move without being seen or heard
Stealth (DEX)
Fight
Attacks, maneuvers, cover allies
Attack (d20) + damage of the weapon
Use metal

Sometimes automatic, sometimes d20 against class DC

Your character sheet (key concepts)
- HP (Hit Points): represent your endurance and resistance. When they reach 0, you're knocked out or in danger of death.
- AC (Armor Class): how hard it is to land a hit on you. The higher, the better.
- MR (Metallic Reserves): if your class uses Allomancy, the MR are your "fuel". You spend them to activate special abilities and they recover with rests or vials.
- Attributes: every character has 6 stats: Strength (STR), Dexterity (DEX), Constitution (CON), Intelligence (INT), Wisdom (WIS) and Charisma (CHA). Each has a value and a modifier. The modifier is added to related rolls.
- Proficiency Bonus (PB): a bonus that increases with your level and applied to everything your character is proficient in.
- DC (Difficulty Class): a number your roll must equal or beat to succeed.
- d20: a 20-sided die. It's the main die of the game: attack, abilities and saves are resolved by rolling d20 + modifiers.

Metals and Allomancy (no spoilers)
Metals are the central fantasy resource of the game. When ingesting a metal and invoking it, an Allomancer can burn their reserves to produce supernatural effects. Each Allomantic class uses a different metal:
- Pewter: superhuman strength and endurance.
- Steel: push metallic objects (projectiles, coins, structures).
- Iron: pull metallic objects toward oneself.
- Tin: hyper-developed senses.
- Zinc / Brass: manipulate others' emotions (intensify or soothe).
- Copper: hide the group's Allomantic presence.
- Bronze: detect nearby Allomancy use.

If a rare object or alloy appears in game (such as Kestium), the DM may make it powerful but risky. Don't assume every metal can be used without consequences.

Two key mechanics you need to know

In addition to attributes, HP and MR, there are two resources that define how this system feels to play:

Momentum (0-3): is your "awesome moment". You earn it by doing creative things: describing an attack narratively, using the environment cleverly, coordinating with another player, or simplemente doing something that surprises the table. The DM awards you 1 Momentum when you do something like this. You can accumulate up to 3 and spend them like so:

Momentum spent
Effect
1
+1d4 to a roll (attack, ability, save)
2
Extra movement or tactical repositioning without provoking opportunity
3
Free cinematic effect (knock down, disarm, break cover, escape grapple, narrate an epic moment)

Momentum does NOT recover with rests. It's earned in play and lost at the start of the next session. Use it or lose it.

Fatigue: when you overload your metal (you spend 2 or more MR in a single round), your body protests. Roll CON against DC 12 + MR spent that round. If you fail, you gain 1 Fatigue level:

Level
Effect
Cleared by...
Fatigue 1
Disadvantage on the next roll
Short rest
Fatigue 2
-2 to all rolls until rest
Long rest
Fatigue 3
You can't spend MR for 1d4 turns
Long rest + medical attention

Fatigue stacks. If you already have Fatigue 1 and fail another overload roll, you go to Fatigue 2. It's a real risk that makes every decision of "spend one more MR" important.

Quick class summary
There are 8 available classes. Seven of them use Allomancy (they burn a metal to activate powers). The eighth is a specialist without metallic powers who compensates with craft, contacts, and versatility.

Character Creation — step by step

Follow these steps in order. If anything is unclear, ask the DM. It should take 15 to 30 minutes.

Step 1: Choose your class
Read the class table on the previous page. Choose the one that appeals to you by role, not mechanics. All classes are viable. If in doubt, talk to the group to cover different roles.

Step 2: Determine your attributes
There are two methods. The DM chooses which one to use at the table:

Method A — Standard Array: Assign these values to the 6 attributes as you prefer: 15, 14, 13, 12, 10, 8. Place higher values in your class's key attributes.

Method B — Rolling: Roll 4d6, drop the lowest die, add the remaining 3. Repeat 6 times. Assign the results as you prefer. If no result is 14+, you can reroll everything.

Attributes: STR (brute force, melee), DEX (agility, ranged, reflexes), CON (resistance, HP, Fatigue), INT (analysis, investigation, technique), WIS (perception, intuition, willpower), CHA (charisma, leadership, deception).

Attribute modifier = (Attribute - 10) / 2, rounded down. Example: 14 → +2, 10 → +0, 8 → -1.

Step 3: Calculate your derived stats

Stat
Formula
Hit Points (HP)
Hit die of your class + CON mod at level 1. Per additional level: roll hit die + CON mod (minimum 1)
Armor Class (AC)
10 + DEX mod + armor bonus (if you have)
Metallic Reserves (MR)
Per your class (see class table). The Mundane Specialist starts with 0
Proficiency Bonus (PB)
+2 at levels 1-4, +3 at 5-8, +4 at 9-10
Initiative
DEX mod (+ class bonus if applicable)
Speed
9 meters (6 squares of 1.5m)

Hit dice per class: Bruto = d10. All other classes (including Soother) = d8.

Step 4: Choose your proficiencies
Each class grants proficiency in 2 skills from its list (see skills page). Also, choose 1 additional skill from the general list. Proficiency = add your PB to rolls for that skill.

Step 5: Starting equipment
Choose ONE of these packs or build your own gear with 25 boxings:

Pack A (Fighter): 1 weapon melee + armor of cuero + vial basic + 5 boxings.
Pack B (Infiltrator): 1 light weapon + kit of ladron + common clothes + vial basic + 8 boxings.
Pack C (Social): 1 light weapon + quality clothes + forged letters + vial mixto + 3 boxings.
Pack D (Mundane): 1 weapon melee + tools of craft + cuerda 15m + 12 boxings.

Additionally, each class starts with 1 vial basic of their metal. The Mundano starts with 5 extra boxings instead of the vial.

Step 6: Background (optional but recommended)
Choose or create a 2-3 sentence background. Where does your character come from? What do they do for a living? What do they want? Ejemplos:
- Dock thief who wants to escape poverty.
- Former noble guard who deserted.
- Street alchemist who experiments with rare metals.
- Factory skaa who accidentally discovered they can burn metal.
The background can grant advantage on related social rolls, at the DM's discretion.

Step 7: Name and details
Give them a name, age, appearance. Write everything on the character sheet. Ready to play.

Skills and Proficiencies

Skills represent what your character can do beyond combat. When you attempt something that requires skill, the DM calls for a skill roll: d20 + attribute modifier + PB (if proficient).

Skill list

Proficiencies by class
Choose 2 skills from your class list + 1 from the general list.

Class
Available skills (choose 2)
Pewter Brute
Athletics, Intimidation, Perception, Survival
Steel Marksman
Acrobatics, Perception, Stealth, Investigation
Iron Puller
Investigation, Sleight of Hand, Alchemy, Athletics
Tin Lurcher
Perception, Stealth, Survival, Insight
Zinc/Brass Soother
Persuasion, Deception, Insight, Intimidation
Copper Smoker
Stealth, Perception, Deception, Survival
Bronze Seeker
Investigation, Perception, Alchemy, History
Mundane Specialist
Any 3 (instead of 2 + 1 general)

Weapon and armor proficiency:
- All classes are proficient with simple weapons (knife, club, sling).
- Bruto, Atractor, Mundano: also proficient with martial weapons (swords, hammers, axes).
- Bruto, Atractor: proficient with medium armor (leather, breastplate).
- Other classes: light armor only or no armor.

Skill rolls:
If proficient: d20 + attribute mod + PB.
If NOT proficient: d20 + attribute mod (no PB).
If you have advantage: roll 2d20, keep the higher.
If you have disadvantage: roll 2d20, keep the lower.



CHARACTER PROGRESSION 1-10
Player's Manual
This suplemento detalla as crece your character from level 1 until level 10. Incluye the progresion general, lo that gains each class level to level, and the talentos available.

Each class has a identidad mecanica clara: not there is dos that is sientan iguales. The target of diseno is that each arquetipo sea util and distinto, without that all quieran choose lo same only per hacer more damage.

Base of the system and resources
The game conserva the base d20 (attack against AC, rolls against DC, initiative, Hit Points). The layer Mistborn adds tres resources own:

Recurso
Uso
MR
Is spends for activar abilities of metals and maneuvers special. Is recovers with descansos and viales.
Momentum
Advantage cinematografica that is gains per descripciones creativas and uso inteligente of the environment.
Fatigue
Riesgo per sobreuso of MR; can dar penalidades temporary until that descanses.

Regla of Fatigue: if you spend 2 or more MR in a single round, rolls CON against DC 12 + MR gastada in the round.

Proficiency Bonus (PB) per level: levels 1-4 = +2, levels 5-8 = +3, levels 9-10 = +4.

Short rest (~1 hour): recuperas the mitad of your MR maxima (redondeada arriba). Long rest (~8 hours): recuperas all your MR and HP. Beber a vial during a short rest recovers MR additional according to the type of vial.

Consejo of balance: Pewter destaca in the front; Steel and Iron in positioning; Tin, Bronze and Copper in information and supervivencia; Zinc-Brass in control social and tactico; the Mundano in consistencia and creatividad.

Progresion detallada per arquetipo
Each class sigue the same estructura of 10 levels. To continuacion is detalla that gains each a in the levels clave.

Pewter Brute
Role: Frente and endurance | Main attribute: STR/CON | HP: d10 | Enfoques N3: Martillo (damage/derribo) / Wall (protection)
- N1: Golpe of Pewter. Your technique basic of combat.
- N3: Elegis enfoque (Martillo for more damage or Wall for proteger allies).
- N5: Asalto Brutal. Primer pico of power ofensivo.
- N9: Pewter Fury. Your technique of firma.
- N10: Titan of Callejon. Maestria total: sos a fuerza imparable.

Role: Damage ranged and movilidad | Main attribute: DEX | HP: d8 | Enfoques N3: Sniper / Acrobata
- N1: Precise Shot. Disparo certero ranged.
- N3: Elegis enfoque (Sniper for range or Acrobata for movilidad).
- N5: Steel Salvo. Pico of damage and presion.
- N9: Lluvia of Monedas. Rafaga devastadora.
- N10: Dueno of the Altura. Dominas cualquier campo of tiro.

Iron Puller
Role: Control of the mapa | Main attribute: INT/DEX | HP: d8 | Enfoques N3: Controller / Ingeniero
- N1: Iron Pull. Atrae and manipula objects metallic.
- N3: Elegis enfoque (Controller for disarm or Ingeniero for interaction with the environment).
- N5: Mighty Pull. Podes move objects pesados and enemies.
- N9: Colapso Dirigido. Control total of the scene with metal.
- N10: Maestro of the Vector. Range and economia of MR superiores.

Tin Lurcher
Role: Scout and reacciones | Main attribute: WIS/DEX | HP: d8 | Enfoques N3: Cazador / Sentinel
- N1: Sentidos agudizados per the Tin. Mejor perception e initiative.
- N3: Elegis enfoque (Cazador for rastreo or Sentinel for protection grupal).
- N5: Tin Reflexes. Reacciones defensivas superiores.
- N9: Tiempo Estirado. Anticipacion and lecturas casi sobrenaturales.
- N10: Depredador of Niebla. Sentidos perfectos, impossible of sorprender.

Zinc-Brass Soother
Role: Control emocional and social | Main attribute: CHA | HP: d8 | Enfoques N3: Agitador / Pacifier
- N1: Riot or Soothe. Empujas the emociones of a target.
- N3: Elegis enfoque (Agitador for caos or Pacifier for desescalar).
- N5: Emotional Wave. Afectas to multiples targets to the time.
- N9: Willbreak. The target remains paralizado per the duda.
- N10: Director of the Escena. Lees and manipulas cualquier situacion social.

Copper Smoker
Role: Ocultacion and soporte | Main attribute: WIS/CON | HP: d8 | Enfoques N3: Shield / Saboteur
- N1: Coppercloud. Ocultas the actividad metallic of your allies.
- N3: Elegis enfoque (Shield for protection of the group or Saboteur for infiltracion).
- N5: Copper Dome. Area of ocultacion more large and efectiva.
- N9: Silencio Perfecto. Anulacion total of deteccion.
- N10: Fortaleza Invisible. Your group is practicamente indetectable.

Bronze Seeker
Role: Deteccion and investigation | Main attribute: WIS/INT | HP: d8 | Enfoques N3: Tracker / Analyst
- N1: Listen to Pulses. Detectas actividad metallic cercana.
- N3: Elegis enfoque (Tracker for seguir fuentes or Analyst for interpretar patrones).
- N5: Deep Reading. Identificas type and origen of the pulse metallic.
- N9: Vision of Red. Mapeas all the actividad metallic of a area.
- N10: Oido of the Imperio. Nada metallic escapa to your deteccion.

Mundane Specialist
Role: Versatilidad without MR | Main attribute: Variable | HP: d8 | Enfoques N3: Picaro / Capataz / Charlatan
- N1: Street Craft. Elegis a craft and ganas proficiency tematica.
- N3: Elegis enfoque (Picaro for sigilo, Capataz for leadership, Charlatan for deception).
- N5: Action Preparada Experta. Your planes e improvisaciones are more efectivos.
- N9: Golpe Preparado. Your technique of firma, fruto of experiencia pura.
- N10: Always Tiene Algo. Consistencia and resources without depender of metals.

Mistborn Talents (levels 4 and 8)
In the levels 4 and 8 you can choose between a Upgrade of Attribute (+2 to a attribute, max 20) or a Talento Mistborn. The talentos dan abilities unicas that definen your estilo of game.

Talentos universales (cualquier class)
Talento
Effect
Catwalk Reflexes
+1 DEX or WIS. Ignoras difficult terrain light in bridges, catwalks and escaleras metallic.
Fellise Streetwise
Bonus to rutas, rumores and atajos urbanos. 1 time per scene, advantage to a roll social of street.
Quick Hands
1 time per short rest: Minor Action extra (only for object, tool or cover).
Hard Blood
+1 CON or +HP fijo. Mejoras the rolls for evitar Fatigue metallic.
Crew Instinct
Si ayudas to a ally and the jugada exits well, ambos gain 1 Momentum (1 time per scene).
Silent Step
Bonus to sigilo and movement in penumbra. Repetis a roll of sigilo fallida 1 time per long rest.

Talentos metallic (requieren class Allomantic)
Talento
Effect
Pewter Heart
Reduce the risk of Fatigue at the use tecnicas of Pewter (bonus to the roll of CON, 1 time per round).
Steel Feet
Mejor reposicionamiento with empujes of Steel and menor risk at the use alturas.
Iron Anchor
Upgrade tirones against objects fijos or masivos and control of weapons metallic.
Precise Pulse (Bronze)
Deteccion of pulses more precisa: mayor rango, more detail or menor DC.
Dense Cloud (Copper)
Your Coppercloud protege better to allies cercanos or dura more time.
Brass Tongue
Bonus for calmar, negociar and bajar hostilidad inicial; better control social outside combat.
Zinc Needle
Provocacion or empuje emocional more fino against 1 target especifico.
Tin Eyes
Perception agudizada and better reaction against emboscadas and attacks sorpresa.

Dados, DC and damage of abilities (referencia)
Situacion
Roll
Contra
Attack with weapon
d20 + attribute + proficiency
AC of the target
Tecnica metallic ofensiva
d20 + attribute + PB
AC or save of the target
Tecnica metallic utilitaria
d20 + attribute + PB
DC 10/13/16/19/22
Resistir Fatigue
d20 + CON
DC 12 + MR gastada in the round
Resistir Zinc/Brass
d20 + WIS or CHA
DC of Ability of the atacante
Detectar pulses (Bronze)
d20 + WIS/INT + PB
DC according to ruido and ocultacion

DC of Ability sugerida: 8 + Proficiency Bonus + modifier of the attribute main.

Damage per cost of MR: 1 MR = 1d6 or 1d8 (basic), 2 MR = 2d6 (strong), 3 MR = 3d6 or control poderoso (firma). The DM adjust according to class and level.

Recordatorio important: not all must resolverse with damage. The classes of Iron, Copper, Bronze and Zinc-Brass brillan generando advantage tactica and information for the group.

Guia fast: that puedo hacer in a scene?
If you have never played a role-playing game, organiza your turn in this orden:
- Primero, pensa where te conviene estar (position).
- Despues, pensa that queres lograr (target).
- Elegi that resource spend (MR, Momentum, or nada).
- Describi as lo haces. A buena description can darte Momentum.

Actions comunes (additionally of atacar)
- Ayudar to a ally: le das advantage in their next roll. Is a jugada enorme.
- Tomar cover: esconderte behind mesas, boxes, pillars or maquinaria.
- Interactuar with the environment: cerrar a door, roll a estanteria, move a chain, cortar a cuerda.
- Hablar: intimidar, distraer, negociar, mentir or gain time.
- Investigar: revisar the environment buscando clues, traps or a oportunidad.
- Preparar action: decidis that vas to hacer when pase algo ("if cruza that door, disparo").

As choose your class rapidamente
- Queres estar at the front and aguantar golpes? Pewter Brute.
- Queres moverte and disparar from ranged? Steel Marksman.
- Queres controlar the mapa moviendo objects metallic? Iron Puller.
- Queres ser the scout and detectar amenazas? Tin Lurcher.
- Queres manipular emociones and controlar situaciones sociales? Zinc-Brass Soother.
- Queres proteger at the group and ocultar their movimientos? Copper Smoker.
- Queres detectar metals, pulses and descubrir clues? Bronze Seeker.
- Queres ser versatile without depender of powers metallic? Mundane Specialist.

sections.title: Combat Appendix
sections.description: Combat system, turn structure, metallic reserves and examples.

pages.text:
Player's Manual (no spoilers)
This appendix explains how it works the combat step by step: that dice roll, how to resolve the abilities, how it works the damage and how to read your turn in table.

The system uses as base the rules of D&D 5e (d20, Armor Class, saving throws) and adds a layer own for metals, maneuvers and interaction with the environment. If you have never played a role-playing game, don't worry: this manual guides you from scratch.

System philosophy
This system aims that the fights are not just "I hit and that's it". In the world of Mistborn, the environment matters: chains, coins, bars, balconies, furnaces, gates, smoke and positioning are tools as much as the weapons. Por eso usamos a base familiar and agregamos rules cortas for metals and maneuvers.

The idea is premiar tres things: creatividad, lectura of the mapa and cooperacion. A character that piensa well can cambiar all a scene incluso without pegar the golpe more strong.

Regla of oro: if a action is creativa and encaja with your character, the DM deberia attempt resolverla with a roll and a consecuencia clara, not bloquearla.

Que is mantiene of D&D and that cambia
Is mantiene (D&D)
Is adds / adapta (Mistborn D20)
d20 for rolls
Metallic Reserves (MR) as resource of powers
AC, HP, initiative
Fatigue and overload per uso excesivo of metals
Damage per dice
Momentum: momentum cinematografico per actions creativas
DC and saving throws
Maniobras with metals and with the environment
Action / Movement / Reaction
Minor Action: encender metal, apuntar, tomar cover, etc.

Si your table prefiere simplicidad maxima, can desactivar algunas rules opcionales (Momentum or Fatigue) without romper the system.

REGLAS BASE
These rules is toman of D&D 5e with ajustes minimos for Mistborn D20.

Initiative
Al start of each combat, all tiran d20 + modifier of DEX. The orden of mayor to menor define quien actua primero. In caso of empate, the player elige quien va before.

Proficiency Bonus (PB)
The PB refleja your experiencia and is adds to rolls of attack, abilities of class and DC of your powers.

Level
PB
1-4
+2
5-8
+3
9-10
+4

Attributes and modifiers
Each attribute has a puntaje (normalmente between 8 and 20). The modifier is calcula igual that in D&D: (puntaje - 10) / 2 redondeado hacia abajo. Example: 14 = +2, 10 = +0, 8 = -1.

Opportunity attack
When a enemy exits of your range melee without use the action Desenganche, you can spend your Reaction for hacerle a attack with weapon. Only 1 per round.

Rests and Recovery
- Short rest (~1 hour): recuperas the mitad of your MR maxima (redondeada arriba) and the usos of abilities marcadas as '1/short rest'.
- Long rest (~8 hours): recuperas all your MR, all your HP and all the usos limitados. Only you can tomar 1 long rest each 24 hours.

Viales metallic
The Allomancers llevan pequenos frascos with soluciones of metals disueltos. Ingerir a vial during a short rest recovers MR additional according to the vial (ver Compendium). In combat, beber a vial costs 1 Minor Action.

Caer to 0 HP
When llegas to 0 Hit Points, caes inconsciente. Al start of each uno of your turns haces a death saving throw: d20 without modifiers. 10 or more = success, less of 10 = failure. Con 3 exitos te estabilizas (seguis inconsciente but not moris). Con 3 fallos, your character dies. A 20 natural te despierta with 1 HP. A 1 natural cuenta as 2 fallos. Si a ally te cura or estabiliza (Kit medico, DC 10), the contadores is reinician.

Estructura of the turn
Each character has in their turn: 1 Action, 1 Movement, 1 Minor Action and until 1 Reaction per round.

Elemento
Que allows
Ejemplos
Action
Your jugada main of the turn
Atacar, use a ability strong, ayudar to a ally, destrabar a gate, romper cover enemiga
Movement
Moverte until your speed (normalmente 9 meters)
Caminar, correr, trepar a tramo short, enter or exit of cover
Minor Action
A micro-action tactica fast
Encender a metal, cambiar of weapon, apuntar with cuidado, tomar cover, activar a palanca
Reaction
A answer outside your turn (maximo 1 per round)
Esquivar a golpe, interponerte for proteger to a ally, a opportunity attack

Consejo for players new: if not sabes that hacer, segui is secuencia basic: Moverte to buena position, Minor Action (apuntar or encender metal), and Action (attack or ayuda to a ally).

Tiradas, dice, damage and dificultades
Tiradas more comunes
- Attack with weapon: d20 + bonificador of attack (attribute relevante + proficiency, if applies) against the AC of the target. Si igualas or superas their AC, the golpe impacta.
- Ability metallic ofensiva: d20 + attribute + Proficiency Bonus against the AC or the saving throw of the target.
- Ability metallic utilitaria: d20 + attribute + Proficiency Bonus against a DC fija that pone the DM.
- Saving throw: when te affects a effect, roll d20 + the modifier correspondiente. Si igualas or superas the DC, resistes the effect.

Formula of DC of ability
DC of Ability = 8 + Proficiency Bonus + modifier of the attribute main.
Esto is lo that the enemies must overcome for resist your powers.

Tabla of dificultades (DC)
Difficulty
DC
Example
Easy
10
Palanca oxidada, convencer to a borracho, atraer a object suelto
Media
13
Desarmar in combat, moverse between boxes, calmar to a guard nervioso
Hard
16
Empujon or tiron in pleno caos, salto in catwalk mojada, mentirle to a capataz atento
Very hard
19
Maniobra fina low presion extrema, romper a formacion organizada
Heroica
22
Action cinematografica of high risk and espectacularidad

Metallic Reserves (MR), fatigue and overload
The Metallic Reserves (MR) representan cuanto metal quemable and energia you have available for your maneuvers alomanticas. Is gastan at the use abilities of class and is recover with descansos or ingiriendo viales.

Level
MR sugerida
Comentario
1-3
3 MR
Inicio of aventura. There is that choose well when use the powers.
4-6
5 MR
Ya allows combinar abilities in a pelea important.
7-10
7 MR
Mayor protagonismo metallic, but with risk of overload.

Costos tipicos: 1 MR for a ability basic, 2 MR for a ability strong, 3 MR for a technique special.

Overload and Fatigue: if in a round gastas 2 or more MR, at the end of your turn debes hacer a roll of CON for evitar fatigue: d20 + CON against DC 12 + MR spent that round.

Level of Fatigue
Effect
Fatigue 1
-1 to rolls fisicas and metallic until short rest
Fatigue 2
Speed reduced 3 m and -1 additional to Reacciones
Fatigue 3
No you can use tecnicas of 2+ MR per 1 round (luego low to Fatigue 2)

Momentum (rule cinematografica)
The Momentum representa ritmo, lectura and advantage tactica. Va of 0 to 3. Is gains per use the environment of way creativa, coordinar with allies or describir actions memorables.

Triggers automaticos (minimum 1-2 Momentum per combat):
- Uso of the environment: use a object of the escenario as weapon, cover or trap (roll a table, cortar a luz, manipular a gate, trabar a door).
- Coordinacion of crew: dos or more PJs actuan in combo in the ficcion (uno distrae, another flanquea; uno empuja, another atrapa). Ambos gain 1 Momentum.
- Riesgo narrativo: aceptas a risk real per a action cinematografica (saltar at the vacio, interponerte ante a golpe, provocar at the boss). Si the action has consecuencias reales (not is gratis), ganas 1 Momentum.
- Primera sangre: the primer PJ that haga damage significativo in a encuentro gains 1 Momentum.
The DM can dar Momentum additional per descripciones memorables, but the triggers of arriba are automaticos — not depend of the generosidad of the DM.

Costo
Effect
1 Momentum
+1d4 to a roll
2 Momentum
Movement short extra or reposicionamiento
3 Momentum
Effect cinematografico (derribo, disarm, romper cover, escapar of zone peligrosa)

Cover, terrain and actions of the environment
Elemento
Regla fast
Media cover
+2 AC against attacks ranged
Cover complete
No te can atacar directo if not there is line of vision
Difficult terrain
Cuesta the doble of movement atravesarlo
Altura
Advantage tactica narrativa; the DM can dar +1 or Momentum
Zona peligrosa
Horno, steam, borde of canal: can exigir save of DEX or CON

Estados and condiciones
Estado
Effect short
Prone
Moverse costs more; vulnerable to attacks melee cercanos
Frightened
Penalidad ofensiva and dificultad for acercarse to the fuente of the miedo
Stunned leve
Pierdes your Minor Action or your Reaction this turn
Bleeding
Sufris a cantidad menor of damage at the start of each turn
Fatigued
Penalidades per sobreuso metallic (ver table of fatigue arriba)

Allomantic Exposure Clock
In the world of Mistborn, use Allomancy in publico is a sentencia of death. The Lord Ruler and their Obligadores cazan Allomancers ilegales without piedad. The Exposure Clock mide cuanto know the autoridades about the actividad Allomantic of the group.

Level
State
Consecuencia
0
Invisible
Nadie knows that there is Allomancers operando. Normalidad.
1
Rumores
Alguien noto algo raro. The prices of viales suben a 20%. NPCs more cautelosos.
2
Investigation
A Obligador starts to hacer questions in the barrio. Contactos is ponen nerviosos. Tiradas sociales in the zone with -1.
3
Alerta
Patrullas of guard buscan activamente. Cover of Copper is esencial for operar. Descansos largos in the zone are arriesgados (50% of interrupcion).
4
Caceria
A Sabueso profesional of the Canton of Inquisition rastrea at the group. Usar Allomancy without Coppercloud active is detectado automatically in 1d4 rounds.
5
Inquisidor
A Steel Inquisitor is despachado. No viene to arrestar — viene to eliminar. The group must huir of the zone or enfrentar lo inenfrentable.

As sube the reloj:
- Usar Allomancy in publico without Coppercloud: +1
- Combat Allomantic with testigos civiles: +1
- Dejar evidencia metallic in the scene (coins clavadas in walls, metal deformado): +1
- A NPC informante reporta at the group: +1

As low the reloj:
- Silencio total (1 session without exposicion publica): -1
- Copper Smoker cubre the scene with Nube: the action not sube the reloj
- Eliminar testigos (moralmente cuestionable but efectivo): -1
- Sobornar to a Obligador menor: -1 (caro, 20+ boxings)
- Cambiar of zone/barrio: -1 (but the reloj of the zone previous not low)

The Reloj is per zone of the city, not global. Si the group opera in 3 barrios diferentes, there is 3 relojes. A Copper Smoker is the better defensa against the Exposicion — their Nube previene that the reloj suba during operaciones.

Allomantic Clash
When dos Allomancers that queman metals opuestos (Steel vs Iron, Zinc vs Brass) or of the same metal is enfrentan directamente, is produce a Allomantic Clash — a lucha of voluntades to traves of the metal.

Mecanica: ambos tiran d20 + their modifier of attribute clave + PB. The that gane per 5 or more obtiene Allomantic Dominance: advantage in their next action against the oponente. Si the diferencia is menor to 5, the choque is a empate tenso and ninguno gains advantage.

When occurs a Choque:
- Tirador empuja a object that a Atractor intenta atraer (or viceversa).
- Dos Embaucadores intentan influir in the same person.
- A Apagador intenta cubrir to alguien that a Sabueso intenta detectar.
- A Bruto resiste a effect of control metallic with brute force.

The Choque is optional — only is active if narrativamente has sentido that dos powers alomanticos colisionen. Captura the tension push-pull of the duelos metallic of the libros, where Vin and the Inquisidores luchaban with coins, empujes and tirones in the aire.

Balance general: the Bruto pega and aguanta, but spends MR and arriesga fatigue. Zinc/Brass, Bronze and Copper brillan in control and information. The Mundano aporta consistencia without spend MR.

Ejemplos completos of turn
Example To: Pewter Brute in a catwalk
- Minor Action: enciende Pewter (spends 1 MR).
- Movement: is mete in the catwalk estrecha and traba the step for that not avancen.
- Action: Golpe of Pewter. Tira d20 + STR + proficiency against the AC of the enemy. Si impacta, does 1d8 + mod of STR and can empujarlo 1 square.
- As uso the environment of way creativa (trabar the step), the DM le grants 1 point of Momentum.
- Reaction (if the needs): Violent Interposition for proteger to a ally that receives a golpe.

Example B: Embaucador + Sabueso trabajando juntos
- The Sabueso detecta pulses metallic with d20 + WIS + PB (descubre that the operador lleva a vial oculto).
- The Embaucador reads the emocion of the operador with d20 + CHA + PB (is nervioso, not hostil).
- The Embaucador uses Calmar for evitar that of the alarma (the operador rolls WIS against the DC of the Embaucador).
- Si has success, the group consigue time for infiltrarse without combat.

Referencia fast

Consejos finales for the table
- No guardes all for "per the dudas": if the scene importa, uses your MR.
- Describi as lo haces. A buena description can darte Momentum.
- Ayudar to a ally is a jugada strong, not a jugada menor. Dar advantage is enorme.
- Si not sabes that roll, deci lo that your character wants lograr. The DM te va to guiar.

Example of combat complete — All the sistemas in action

This example recorre a encuentro real step by step for show as interactuan the Metallic Reserves (MR), the overload, the fatigue, the Momentum, the Exposure Clock and the Allomantic Clash. The scene is ficticia but representativa of lo that can pasar in your table.

Escena: The emboscada of the deposito
The crew (level 3) is formada per Kaelen (Pewter Brute), Vex (Tiradora of Steel) and Dael (Embaucador of Zinc). Entran to a deposito of the Canton for robar a cargamento of atium. Adentro: 4 guards menores (AC 12, HP 20 each uno) and Serran, a Iron Puller moderado (AC 14, HP 35, 4 MR).

The tres PJs are in level 3, like this that each uno has 3 MR maximos.

Estado of the Exposure Clock: 1 (Rumores). Ya usaron Allomancy in the taberna the session pasada.

Initiative
All tiran d20 + DEX:
- Vex: 18 (DEX +3)
- Serran: 15 (DEX +2)
- Kaelen: 12 (STR +3, DEX 0)
- Dael: 11 (CHA +3, DEX -1)
- Guardias: 9 (bloque)

Orden: Vex → Serran → Kaelen → Dael → Guardias.

RONDA 1

Turno of Vex (Tiradora of Steel — 3/3 MR)
- Minor Action: Encender Steel (gratis, not costs MR — only active the lineas of metal)
- Movement: Sube to a catwalk elevada for tener line of vision.
- Action: Precise Shot against Guardia 1. Tira d20 + DEX (+3) + comp (+2) = d20+5 vs AC 12. Saca 14. Impacta. Damage: 1d6+1d4+3 = 10 damage. The guard remains herido.
- Momentum: Vex gano 1 Momentum per use the environment (subir to the catwalk for better angulo). Pasa of 0 to 1 Momentum.
- MR gastada is round: 0. Sin chequeo of overload.

Turno of Serran (Atractor enemy — 4/4 MR)
- Minor Action: Encender Iron.
- Action: Iron Pull against the weapon of Vex. Tira d20+INT(+2)+PB(+2)=d20+4 vs DC 14. Saca 16. Exito: the weapon of Vex vuela 3 meters hacia the.
- The DM marks +1 at the Exposure Clock per Allomancy with testigos. The Reloj sube of 1 to 2 (Investigation).
- MR gastada: 1. Sin overload.

Turno of Kaelen (Pewter Brute — 3/3 MR)
- Minor Action: Burn Pewter (costs 1 MR. Baja to 2/3 MR).
- Movement: Corre hacia Guardia 2.
- Action: Golpe of Pewter against Guardia 2. Tira d20+STR(+3)+comp(+2)=d20+5 vs AC 12. Saca 17. Impacta. Damage: 1d8+3 = 9. The empuje lo rolls against the wall. The guard remains to 11 HP.
- MR gastada is round: 1. Sin overload.
- Momentum: Kaelen gano 1 Momentum per Primera Sangre (primer golpe metallic of the combat). Pasa to 1 Momentum.

Turno of Dael (Embaucador of Zinc — 3/3 MR)
- Minor Action: Burn Zinc (gratis).
- Action: Irritar about the Guardias 3 and 4. Tira d20+CHA(+3)+PB(+2)=d20+5 vs save WIS of the guards (DC 13). Guardia 3 saca 8 (falla): remains Irritado, disadvantage in their next attack. Guardia 4 saca 14: resiste.
- MR gastada: 1. Sin overload.
- Dael marks +1 in the Reloj per uso of Allomancy in publico without Nube. Reloj: 2 (already estaba in 2, is mantiene because the DM decidio that is the same evento).

Turno of the Guardias
- Guardia 1 (herido, 10 HP): Ataca to Kaelen. d20+3 vs AC 14. Saca 11. Falla.
- Guardia 2 (11 HP): Ataca to Kaelen. d20+3 vs AC 14. Saca 16. Impacta. 1d6+2 = 6 damage to Kaelen.
- Guardia 3 (Irritado): Ataca to Dael with disadvantage. Saca 7 and 12, uses the menor: 7+3=10 vs AC 11. Falla.
- Guardia 4: Corre to dar the alarma.

Fin of round 1. Estado:
- Vex: 3/3 MR, 1 Momentum, without weapon (Serran the has)
- Kaelen: 2/3 MR, 1 Momentum, HP: 22/28
- Dael: 2/3 MR, 0 Momentum
- Exposure Clock: 2 (Investigation)
- Serran: 3/4 MR
- 1 guard herido, 1 irritado, 1 corriendo to the alarma

RONDA 2

Turno of Vex (3/3 MR, 1 Momentum)
Vex needs recover their weapon or improvisar. Decide:
- Minor Action: Saca the coins alomanticas of their bolsa (tool of Tirador).
- Action: Steel Push about the coins hacia Guardia 4 (the that corre to the alarma). d20+DEX(+3)+PB(+2)=d20+5 vs DC 13. Saca 15. Exito: the coins impactan at the guard, 1d6+3 = 7 damage and lo frenan 1 round.
- Gasta 1 Momentum for gain +1d4 to the roll of damage: +3 more. Total 10 damage. The guard remains to 10 HP and not arrives to the alarma.
- MR gastada: 1. Sin overload.
- Reloj: +1 → sube to 3 (Alerta). ¡Monedas volando is very visible!

Turno of Serran (3/4 MR)
Serran wants use the weapon robada of Vex against Kaelen. But Vex already not has line of metal hacia the weapon because Serran the is sosteniendo.
- Action: Mighty Pull — intenta atraer the chains of the ceiling about Kaelen. d20+INT(+2)+PB(+2)=d20+4 vs DC 16. Saca 12. Falla. The chains is sacuden but not fall.
- MR gastada: 2. Serran spending 2 MR in is round → chequeo of Overload. d20+CON(+1) vs DC 12+2=14. Saca 10. Falla. Serran gains Fatigue 1 (-1 to rolls fisicas and metallic).

Turno of Kaelen (2/3 MR, 1 Momentum)
Kaelen ve to Serran debilitado per the fatigue. Decide ir strong.
- Movement: Is acerca to Serran.
- Action: Pewter Fury against Serran. d20+STR(+3)+comp(+2)=d20+5 vs AC 14. Saca 19. Impacta. Damage: 2d6+3 = 11. Empuje and possible derribo: Serran rolls save STR DC 13. Saca 9 (-1 per fatigue = 8). Cae Prone.
- MR gastada is round: 2 (1 Pewter sigue active + 2 Furia). ¡Kaelen spending 2 MR! Chequeo of overload: d20+CON(+3) vs DC 12+2=14. Saca 16. Exito. Is salva of the fatigue... per ahora.
- Momentum: Gano 1 Momentum per Coordinacion of Crew (Vex distrajo to the guards, the golpeo at the lider). Pasa to 2 Momentum.

CHOQUE ALOMANTICO
Serran, in the ground, intenta a Iron Pull desesperado against the armor of Kaelen. Kaelen resiste with the lineas of Pewter.
The DM declara a Allomantic Clash:
- Serran: d20 + INT(+2) + PB(+2) = d20+4, but -1 per Fatigue 1 = d20+3. Saca 14.
- Kaelen: d20 + CON(+3) + PB(+2) = d20+5. Saca 20.
- Diferencia: 20 vs 14 = 6 points. Kaelen gains per 5+: obtiene Allomantic Dominance — advantage in their next action against Serran.

Turno of Dael (2/3 MR)
- Action: Emotional Reading about Serran (caido, fatigued). d20+CHA(+3)+PB(+2)=d20+5 vs DC 12. Saca 17. Exito: Dael detecta PANICO. Le says to Kaelen: "This quebrado, not va to pelear more".
- MR gastada: 1. Sin overload.
- Momentum: Dael gano 1 Momentum per Coordinacion of Crew (information tactica for Kaelen).

Turno of the Guardias
- Guardia 1 (10 HP): Intenta huir. Kaelen uses their Reaction: Attack of Oportunidad with advantage (Allomantic Dominance). d20+5 with advantage, saca 18 and 12, uses 18. Impacta. 1d8+3 = 8 damage. Guardia 1 falls to 2 HP and is rinde.
- Guardia 2: Ve to their jefe in the ground. Tira moral (d20 vs DC 12, falla). Suelta the weapon.
- Guardia 3: Todavia Irritado. Ataca to Dael. d20+3 vs AC 11. Saca 14. Impacta. 1d6+2 = 5 damage.
- Guardia 4 (10 HP, frenado): No can actuar is round.

Fin of round 2. Estado:
- Vex: 2/3 MR, 0 Momentum
- Kaelen: 0/3 MR, 2 Momentum, HP: 22/28
- Dael: 1/3 MR, 1 Momentum, HP: 20/25
- Serran: Prone, Fatigue 1, 24/35 HP, 1/4 MR
- Exposure Clock: 3 (Alerta) — the situacion is pone tensa. Si siguen peleando in publico, a Obligador va to venir.
- 2 guards rendidos, 1 irritado, 1 frenado

RONDA 3 — RESOLUCION

Turno of Vex
- Apunta at the Guardia 4 (the of the alarma). Action: Precise Shot. d20+5 vs AC 12. Saca 13. 1d6+1d4+3 = 8 damage. The guard falls to 2 HP. Levanta the hands.

Turno of Kaelen (0/3 MR, 2 Momentum)
Kaelen is quedo without MR. No can use abilities metallic. But has 2 Momentum.
- Gasta 2 Momentum: Movement extra. Is posiciona about Serran.
- Action: Intimidation (d20+STR+comp = d20+5 vs DC of Serran, debilitado). Le pone the pie encima and says: "Is termino."
- The DM pide to Serran a save of WIS vs DC 13. Serran saca 7 (-1 fatigue = 6). Falla. Serran is rinde.

The combat ends without kill to nadie. The DM offers a choice: ¿dejan testigos (Reloj is mantiene in 3) or silencian the scene (Reloj low to 2 but there is consecuencia moral)?

Resumen mecanico of the encuentro

Metallic Reserves: The tres PJs empezaron with 3 MR and the gastaron in 2.5 rounds. Kaelen termino in 0, Vex in 2, Dael in 1. Nadie fue completamente inutil at the end — the actions basicas (attack with weapon, intimidacion) not cost MR.

Overload: Is active dos times (Serran round 2, Kaelen round 2). Serran failure and gano Fatigue 1, lo that le cost -1 in all their rolls — incluyendo the Allomantic Clash that perdio. Kaelen step the chequeo and is salvo.

Fatigue: Only Serran acumulo fatigue. Their -1 to rolls afectaron their save of derribo and the Choque. Si hubiera fallado another time, habria subido to Fatigue 2 (speed reduced, -1 to Reacciones). The fatigue is a espiral: the that is overload remains in disadvantage creciente.

Momentum: Is genero 5 times in the encuentro: environment (Vex subio to catwalk), primera sangre (Kaelen), coordinacion x2 (Kaelen-Vex, Dael-Kaelen), risk narrativo (coins volando). Is spending 3 times: +1d4 damage, movement extra, intimidacion end. The Momentum premio the actions creativas and cooperativas.

Allomantic Clash: Is resolvio in a tiro opuesto (d20+attribute+PB). The fatigue of Serran fue decisiva: -1 le cost the duelo per 6 points. The ganador obtuvo Allomantic Dominance (advantage in the following action), that Kaelen uso for the opportunity attack.

Exposure Clock: Subio of 1 (Rumores) to 3 (Alerta) in 3 rounds. Each uso of Allomancy visible lo empujo. Si the crew not toma medidas (silencio, sobornar, cambiar of zone), the next session empezara with a Obligador haciendo questions. The Reloj is presion social that acumula between sesiones.

Leccion clave: The combat not is resolvio only with damage. The information (Emotional Reading), the control (Irritar, Empuje of coins), the position (catwalk), the fatigue enemiga and the intimidacion end fueron igual of decisivos that the golpes. Eso is exactamente lo that busca the system Mistborn D20: fights cinematograficas where pensar importa as much as pegar.

Guia of combat for the DM

This section is for the Game Master. Contiene the tools for disenar encuentros equilibrados, escalar dificultad, and manejar the economia of resources of the group. These rules are genericas: sirven for cualquier campaign that use the system Mistborn D20.

Filosofia of combat

The combat in Mistborn D20 NO is "mato monstruos and subo of level". Is a tool narrativa that crea tension, fuerza decisiones and recompensa the creatividad. The combates deberian sentirse as scenes of action in a pelicula of atracos: rapidos, sucios, with environment, and with options more alla of "ataco".

6 principios of diseno:

1. All pelea has a salida not violenta. No always is facil, not always is better, but existe. Soborno, intimidacion, negociacion, huida — always deberia haber at the less 1 alternativa to the violencia total. Only the enemies fanaticos or monstruosos luchan to death without option.

2. The environment is more important that the stats. A maton with AC 12 and 22 HP is trivial in campo abierto. Ponelo behind cover, about a catwalk unstable, with a barrel of oil between the and the group, and is a desafio tactico. The fights aburridas are culpa of the DM, not of the numeros.

3. The economia of MR define the ritmo. The PJs have 5-6 MR at the level 3-5. Each ability costs 1-2 MR. Si gastan all in the primera pelea, arrive at the boss without resources. The DM must disenar the ritmo of encuentros sabiendo cuantos MR total has the group.

4. Fatigue is drama, not castigo. When a Bruto spends 2 MR in a turn and rolls CON for evitar Fatigue, that roll deberia sentirse important. Fatigue 2 in the moment equivocado cambia a pelea. Dejalo ser tenso.

5. The enemies reaccionan to the classes. A guard that ve to a Bruto quemar Pewter cambia of estrategia. A enemy that siente the Nube of a Apagador enters in panico. The enemies inteligentes priorizan at the character more dangerous for ellos.

6. Each combat has a reloj interno. Despues of 3-4 rounds, algo cambia: arrive refuerzos, the terrain is modifica, a NPC interviene, or the enemies huyen. The fights not deberian durar more of 5 rounds.

Economia of MR between encuentros

The resource more important that gestiona the DM not is the oro ni the HP: is the MR of the group. Si the PJs arrive at the encuentro end with all their MR, the pelea is facil. Si arrive secos, can be desesperante. The DM controla esto with the numero of encuentros before of the descanso.

Guia general of ritmo per session:

Tipo of session
Encuentros
Descansos cortos
MR target at the boss
Exploracion light
1-2 menores
1-2
80%+ of the max
Standard
2 menores + 1 strong
1
50-70% of the max
Challenging
2-3 menores + 1 boss
1
30-50% of the max
Brutal (point of not retorno)
3+ encadenados without descanso
0
Lo that quede

Short rest: recover mitad of MR max (redondeado arriba). Con 5 MR max, recover 3. Toma ~1 hour narrativa. Limpia Fatigue 1.
Long rest: recover TODO. Toma ~8 hours. Limpia Fatigue 1-2.

Si a PJ arrives to a combat important without MR: not lo dejes inutil. The entornos interactivos work without MR. The attacks with normal weapon siguen siendo validos. And the Momentum is gains with creatividad, not with metal.

Escalado per tamano of group

The system is balanceado for 4 PJs. Si the table has more or less, adjust:

3 PJs:
- Enemies menores: -1 enemy per encuentro Or -25% HP to each uno.
- Boss: -20% HP. Sin action legendaria in fase 1.
- 1 short rest extra per session.

5 PJs:
- Enemies menores: +1 enemy per encuentro Or +20% HP.
- Boss: +20% HP. +1 secuaz menor.
- Sin descanso extra (more PJs = more MR total).

6 PJs:
- All lo of 5 PJs + each boss has 1 action legendaria extra.
- Considerar agregar 1 enemy tematico unico per encuentro main.

Level 3 vs level 5:
Si the group is level 5+ (in time of level 3):
- +1 to impactar and DC of enemies.
- +10 HP base to each enemy.
- Boss: +2 at the attack, +15-20 HP per fase.

As reaccionan the enemies to each class

The enemies inteligentes (jefes, veteranos, Allomancers) ajustan their tactica according to lo that ven. The enemies menores (matones, guards basicos) NO cambian: flanquean and golpean.

Class of the PJ
Reaction of the enemy inteligente
Pewter Brute
Priorizan ranged. Usan cover and attacks ranged. Si not have arco, tiran objects. Intentan agotar at the Bruto for that between in Fatigue.
Steel Marksman
Priorizan cover and cierre of ranged. Flanquean per rutas that cortan the line of tiro.
Iron Puller
Aseguran their weapons (correas, agarre strong). Evitan estar near metal suelto.
Tin Lurcher
Crean ruido ambiental for saturar the sentidos. Rompen things, gritan.
Zinc/Brass Soother
Resisten with willpower. The veteranos know that existe the manipulacion emocional. +2 DC for the Embaucador against enemies advertidos.
Copper Smoker
Entran in panico if depend of Allomancy. The that not usan Allomancy ni lo notan.
Bronze Seeker
Saben that not can esconderse. Intentan abrumar with multiples fuentes of pulse metallic (activan maquinaria, furnaces).
Mundane Specialist
Lo subestiman. Priorizan to the Allomancers. Esto le da at the Mundano advantage in their primera action.

Condiciones of victoria alternativas

No all the combates must end with all the enemies to 0 HP. Para each encuentro that disenes, preguntate: that happens if the PJs NO want pelear? Tipos of victoria alternativa:

Tipo
As works
DC sugerida
Huida
The PJs escapan. The enemies persiguen 1d4 rounds and luego abandonan.
Athletics/Stealth DC 12-14
Soborno
The PJs offer algo of value. Only works with enemies mercenarios or covidiosos (not with fanaticos).
Persuasion DC 12 + level of amenaza
Intimidation
A PJ demuestra fuerza obvia (Allomancy, weapon, presencia). The cobardes huyen.
Intimidation DC 14-16
Negociacion
The PJs offer a trato. Requiere that the enemy tenga algo that perder.
Persuasion DC 14-16, with modifiers per contexto
Stealth total
Nunca detectados. No there is combat.
Stealth DC 12-16 grupal
Distraccion
The PJs crean a evento that desvia the atencion. Tiempo limitado.
Creatividad of the PJ + DC variable
Rendicion of the enemy
Si the PJs demuestran superioridad clara, enemies not-fanaticos is rinden.
Automatico if the PJs derrotan at the 60%+ of the enemies

Mutacion dinamica — triggers of combat

Each combat deberia tener a trigger that cambia the situacion to mitad of pelea. Esto evita that the combates sean estaticos. The DM prepara 1-2 triggers per encuentro.

Tipo of trigger
Example
Effect
Temporal
Ronda 3-4
Llegan refuerzos, or the enemies cambian tactica, or the terrain cambia
Umbral of HP
The lider low to 50%
Cambia of estrategia (agresion, huida, or pide refuerzos)
Ambiental
Algo is rompe, is prende fire, is derrumba
The mapa cambia. Nuevas covers, difficult terrain, new rutas
Social
A PJ says algo especifico
A enemy duda, is rinde, or enters in furia (according to the contexto)
Recurso
The PJs han spent 50%+ of MR
The DM suaviza the presion (enemies start to retirarse) or the intensifica
Fase of boss
The boss low to cierto HP
Cambia of fase: new abilities, terrain diferente, dialogo

Disenar a trigger: before of the encuentro, escribi 1 frase: "When [condicion], [consecuencia]." Example: "When the lider baje to the mitad of HP, apaga the luces and huye." Eso is all lo that you need.

Plantilla of enemies — as crear your own NPCs of combat

Usa is plantilla for disenar cualquier enemy. The values base are calibrados for PJs of level 3-5. Adjust according to the level (ver table of escalado arriba).

Plantilla basic:

[NOMBRE DEL ENEMIGO]
Level of amenaza: [menor / moderado / strong / boss]
AC: [ver table abajo]
HP: [ver table abajo]
Speed: 9m (or 6m if lleva armor heavy)
Attack: +[PB + STR mod or DEX] to impactar, [die of damage] + mod
STR/DEX/CON/INT/WIS/CHA: [asignar according to type]
Salvaciones fuertes: [1-2 attributes where has advantage]

Tabla of stats base per level of amenaza:

Actions special per level of amenaza:

Amenaza menor (1-2 actions):
- Attack melee or ranged. Eso is all.
- Opcionalmente: huir if low to 25% HP.

Amenaza moderada (2-3 actions):
- Attack + 1 ability tactica (derribar, desarmar, empujar).
- Reaction: oportunidad or bloqueo sencillo.
- Puede tener 1 ability metallic if is Allomancer (1-2 MR).

Amenaza strong (3-4 actions):
- Attack + ability metallic + tactica of environment.
- 1 action legendaria (outside turn): movement or attack menor.
- 3-5 MR if is Allomancer.
- Puede use Momentum enemy (1-2, at the DM's discretion) for reflejar proficiency.

Boss (5+ actions efectivas):
- Attack main + ability of area + environment + fases.
- 2-3 actions legendarias.
- 5-8 MR if is Allomancer.
- Fases of combat: cambios of comportamiento to 75%, 50%, 25% HP.
- 1 action of environment per round (lair action) if pelea in their terrain.

MR for NPCs Allomancers:
The NPCs Allomancers usan MR of the same way that the PJs, but simplificado:
- Enemy menor Allomancer: 2 MR. Gasta 1 per ability. Sin overload.
- Enemy moderado Allomancer: 3-4 MR. Puede sobrecargar (but rolls CON as the PJs).
- Boss Allomancer: 5-8 MR. Puede sobrecargar. The Fatigue of the boss is a tool dramatica — a boss fatigued pelea diferente.

Disenar in 5 minutes:
1. Elegi level of amenaza → busca stats in the table.
2. Elegi arquetipo → asigna attributes.
3. Escribi 1 line of comportamiento: "Flanquea and golpea" or "Protege at the lider, ignora at the resto" or "Huye if loses the weapon."
4. Si is Allomancer, dale 1-2 abilities of their class (ver tables in the Seccion of Combat).
5. Elegi 1 trigger of mutacion: "When baje to 50%, [does algo diferente]."
Listo. No you need more for a enemy funcional.

ITEM COMPENDIUM
This compendium list weapons, equipment, viales metallic and objects available in Fellise. The prices are in the local currency: 1 boxing = 10 clips.

Adjust prices +/-20% according to abundance in the city or scarcity in session. The items marked as 'optional' depend of the tone of your campaign (with or without firearms).

The compendium includes 7 categories: weapons melee, weapons ranged, armors and clothing, tools, consumables tactical, viales and metals, and objects of world.

Propiedades of weapons — definiciones

The weapons can tener a or more propiedades that affect how they work:

Propiedad
Effect
Ligera
Podes use dos weapons Ligeras (a in each hand). Atacar with the segunda is a Minor Action: roll damage but NO sumas mod of attribute.
Finesa
Podes use STR or DEX for the attack and the damage (elegis at the atacar).
Thrown X/And
Podes lanzarla. X = range normal, And = range maximo with disadvantage.
Range Xm
Tenes range extendido in melee (normalmente 1.5m, with Range 3m).
Versatile
Podes usarla with 1 or 2 hands. Con 2 hands sube 1 level of damage (ej: 1d6 → 1d8).
Two-handed
Requiere ambas hands for usarla. No you can llevar shield u another object.
Pesada
Criaturas pequenas have disadvantage. Generalmente more poderosas.
Reload
Despues of disparar you need 1 Minor Action for recargar before of volver to disparar.
Loud
The disparo is escucha in all the distrito. Stealth impossible after of disparar.

Atium (dose — god metal)
Consumible
No has price (invaluable)
Cualquier Allomancer can quemar Atium — not is exclusivo of Mistborn. Al consumirlo: during 1 round, ves 0.5 segundos in the futuro. Effect mecanico: +5 to AC and rolls of attack during 1 turn complete (your turn + reacciones until your next turn). Despues is acaba, irrecuperable. Is the metal more raro and codiciado of the world — controlado per the Lord Ruler. Encontrar a dosis is a evento of campaign, not a item of tienda. The Mistings that only queman Atium is llaman Videntes.

Duralumin (dose — amplifier metal)
Consumible
No has price (raro)
Cualquier Allomancer can quemar Duraluminio, but only has effect if these quemando OTRO metal simultaneamente. Al consumirlo: gastas of golpe TODAS your MR restantes and your next ability Allomantic in that same turn has effect DUPLICADO (doble damage, doble range, doble duracion, or doble area — the DM elige the more apropiada). Despues quedas to 0 MR until your next descanso — not you can beber viales for recuperarte per 1 hour (the body needs procesar the overload). Momento of all-or-nada: the Duraluminio is the apuesta maxima. A Misting of Duraluminio (only quema this metal) is inutil — not has another metal that amplificar.

Recuperacion of MR with viales

The viales are the way main of recover MR outside the descansos. The rules:

Beber a vial in combat: costs 1 Minor Action.
Beber a vial outside combat: free (toma some segundos).

Tipo of vial
MR recuperada
Notes
Individual Dose (1 metal)
+2 MR
Only works if the metal is the tuyo. A Bruto not can use a Dosis of zinc.
Basic Vial (1 metal)
+3 MR
Mas concentrado that a dosis individual.
Mixed Vial (2 metals)
+2 MR per metal tuyo
Si a Bruto bebe a vial with peltre and acero, only recovers +2 (per the peltre).
Crew Vial (4 metals)
+2 MR per metal tuyo
Util if there is varios Allomancers. Pasan the vial.
Full Vial (8 metals)
+2 MR per metal tuyo
All recover algo. Caro but eficiente for the group.
Pure Dose (cualquier metal)
+3 MR
Mayor calidad, less risk of impuridades.

Limite: a character can beneficiarse of maximo 2 viales per short rest. Beber a 3er vial not has effect (the body not can procesar more metal). In combat not there is limite of viales per encuentro, but each uno is 1 Minor Action.

The Mundane Specialist not can use viales (not quema metal). Puede llevarlos for their companeros.

Impuridades: if the DM wants agregar risk, a vial barato or of origen dudoso podria tener impuridades. Tiras CON DC 12 at the beberlo; if fallas, recuperas only the mitad of the MR and ganas nauseas (disadvantage in the next roll of attack).

sections.title: DM Campaign — Shadows over Fellise
sections.description: Complete DM script: acts, NPCs, puzzles, dialogues & scaling.

pages.text:
PART I — DM Guide (with spoilers)
1. Tone, ritmo and targets

Tone: oscuro, criminal, urbano-industrial. Fellise huele to soot, metal quemado and canal estancado. The mist not is decoracion: is part of the identidad of the city. The violencia is sucia, fast and with consecuencias. The desigualdad between nobles and skaa is siente in each esquina.

Ritmo: each session deberia tener at the less a scene of tension, a of roleo free and a of consecuencia. No does falta that all sea combat; the mejores scenes of Mistborn are decisiones imposibles. Alternar between momentos of planificacion (the crew discute that hacer), action (infiltraciones, combates, persecuciones) and drama (traiciones, revelaciones, perdidas).

Objetivo of campaign: the players start as a crew criminal in Fellise that acepta a golpe aparentemente simple. To traves of the traicion, the investigation of the Kestium (a metal experimental unstable), the revelacion of that their companero Silen is a kandra, and the enfrentamiento with Maelor Kest, descubren that the world is more large and dangerous of lo that imaginaban. The campaign ends with the aparicion of a Steel Inquisitor and the huida hacia Luthadel, abriendo the door to a segunda temporada.

Ajuste of table: the players NO necesitan know the novelas of Mistborn. The information of the world is reveals per descubrimiento: ellos aprenden that is a Allomantic when ven to alguien quemar metal, not per a exposicion previa. Si a player knows the libros, pedile that not spoilee and disfrutelo from the side of the DM.

Filosofia of scenes: each scene has a ENTORNO — elementos fisicos that the characters can use with their abilities. No pongas walls vacias: pone chains colgantes, barrels of oil, catwalks of metal, ventanas rotas, canales of water. The environment is another character.

2. Relojes of tension (clocks)

Usa relojes of 4-6 segmentos. When is llenan, the world reacciona. No castigan at the player: cambian the escenario.

Reloj
Is llena when...
Effect at the completarse
House Kest is entera
Fallos ruidosos, testigos vivos, sabotajes visibles, demoras in actos 1-2
Refuerzos in the fundicion, Valek alerta, Maelor prepara contramedidas. The entrada at the subsuelo has more guards and traps activas.
Rastro of Silen is enfria
Descansan more of 2 days between clues, persiguen callejones without salida, reveal their busqueda to desconocidos
Algunas clues is lose but aparecen rutas alternativas more peligrosas. Silen tuvo time of preparar their terrain in the canal.
Inestabilidad of the Kestium
Usan fragmentos without control, fuerzan MR with Kestium, intentan consumir more of 1 dosis per descanso
Sintomas fisicos (venas oscuras, temblores), pulses detectables ranged, effects impredecibles in combat (roll in table of caos).
Reputacion of the crew
Exitos publicos, ayudan to skaa, desafian guards abiertamente
Ganan allies menores (informantes, escondites), but also atraen atencion noble. The contactos of Darven is abren more facil.

3. NPCs principales and claves of interpretacion

Darven — Crew boss and criminal mentor
Voz: grave, pausada, as if each palabra costara. Nunca levanta the voz.
Motivacion: proteger to their people. No le importa the riqueza; le importa that the suyos sobrevivan another day.
Frase firma: "No me traigas excusas, traeme options."
Frase alternativa: "Si esto fuera facil, not valdria nada."
Secreto: Darven knows that algo raro happens with Silen but Never tuvo pruebas. Lo that lo kills not is the traicion; is not haber confiado in their instinto.
Muerte/caida: if Darven dies, their ultimas palabras deberian ser personales hacia a PJ especifico, not a discurso. "Cuida to the rest" or "No te conviertas in mi."

Silen — Darven's second (secret: kandra in Maelor's service)
Voz: calma absoluta, tone low, Never parece nervioso. Habla as alguien that already penso all tres times.
Motivacion real: is cumpliendo a Contrato (sagrado for the kandra). No odia to the crew; of hecho, les tomo carino genuino. Eso is lo that does tragica their traicion.
Frase firma: "Primero mirar, after tocar."
Gesto firma: is acomoda the guante derecho with dos tirones cortos before of speak of algo serio.
Objeto firma: a coin perforada that le dio Darven. The conserva incluso after of the traicion.
Info impossible: knows apodos, anecdotas internas and secretos of the crew that a espia normal not podria know. Esto is the clue more important: knows demasiado.
Arco emocional: at the principio of the game, Silen is simplemente the type confiable. To medida that pasan the actos, the DM deberia hacer that Silen tenga momentos of duda genuina: miradas largas, silencios before of dar ordenes, a time that casi says algo and is calla.

Maelor Kest — Main antagonist / House Kest operative
Voz: educada, tranquila, with the cadencia of alguien that is acostumbrado to that lo escuchen. Nunca grita until the fase 3.
Motivacion: Maelor not is malvado per gusto. Cree genuinamente that the Kestium can cambiar the equilibrio of power of the Final Empire. The skaa that mueren in their experimentos are "necesarios" for the progreso. Is a visionario with a brujula moral rota. Eso lo does more dangerous that a villano simple.
Backstory: fue a segundo hijo of House Kest, ignorado per their familia until that descubrio the Kestium in a veta low Fellise. Ahora is the member more poderoso of the casa, but sigue necesitando aprobacion. Quiere presentar the Kestium at the Lord Ruler as prueba of their value.
Frase firma: "Ustedes ven crimen. Yo veo progreso."
Frase alternativa: "The diferencia between descubrimiento and horror depends of quien lo controla."
Debilidad: their obsesion per the control. When loses the control of the laboratorio (fase 2-3), is desespera. Ahi is where the players can explotarlo.
Secreto mayor (only DM): Maelor is a Mistborn. Lo descubrio during their experimentos with Kestium — the metal reacciono to their sangre noble and desperto powers alomanticos multiples that llevaba dormidos all their vida. Their padre, Lord Straff Kest (patriarca of the Casa), lo descubrio and ahora lo uses as tool: "Sos the weapon that House Kest needs for arrive at the Lord Ruler."

Maelor NO is a Mistborn entrenado. No has the ability of a Kelsier ni the intuition of a Vin. Quema metals of way tosca, imprecisa, and depends of the aparato of Kestium for amplificar lo that their reservas naturales not alcanzan. Their defectos:
- Only domina well 2-3 metals (Steel, Pewter, Zinc). The demas the quema with torpeza.
- No knows Empujar and Tirar at the same time. No can volar.
- Is fatigue fast because quema multiples metals without eficiencia.
- Sin the aparato, is a Allomancer mediocre with acceso to muchos metals and maestria in ninguno.
Esto is their debilidad And their tragedia: is poderoso in papel but fragil in practica. A hijo of noble at the that their padre convirtio in weapon without darle the option of say that not.

Revelacion progresiva (NO revelar before of time):
- Acto 2: the PJs is cruzan with "a noble with guantes finos" that only shows Steel Push and huye. Piensan that is a Tirador comun.
- Acto 3 Fase 1: Maelor pelea conectado at the aparato. No quema metals own — uses the maquina.
- Acto 3 Fase 2: the aparato falla. Maelor quema Pewter (fuerza) and Steel (empuje). The PJs that lo vieron in the Acto 2 reconocen the Steel. But ahora also there is Pewter. "Espera... is quemando DOS metals?"
- Acto 3 Fase 3: desesperado, quema TODO. Zinc, Tin, Iron, Pewter, Steel. A Sabueso grita: "ES UN NACIDO DE LA BRUMA." Terror... but Maelor already is roto. Is poderoso and patetico at the same time.

In combat: in the Acto 2 pelea as a espadachin noble with a as low the manga (Steel). In the Acto 3 starts as tecnico of the aparato, escala to Allomancer dual and ends as Mistborn desesperado that is autodestruye. The combat against Maelor is a puzzle, a revelacion and a tragedia.

Valek — Foreman of the foundry underground
Voz: short, without adornos, as a informe militar. Each frase is a orden.
Motivacion: orgullo profesional. No le importa House Kest ni the Kestium; le importa that their subsuelo funcione perfecto. The PJ are a variable that arruina their system.
Frase firma: "Aca abajo nada falla. Falla the people."
Frase alternativa: "Yo not tengo that gain. Only tengo that cerrar the gates."
In combat: uses the environment as weapon. No pelea justo; active steam, cierra catwalks, apaga luces. Si the PJ lo acorralan in campo abierto, is vulnerable.

Kaerin — Ambiguous ally, powerful Allomancer
Voz: precisa, economica, without emociones evidentes. Habla as alguien that already calculo all the salidas.
Motivacion: has their own agenda against House Kest per razones that not reveals. Ayuda to the PJ only because les conviene to ambos. Si aparece a Inquisidor, is va without dudar.
Frase firma: "No vine per ustedes."
Frase alternativa: "Si there is a Inquisidor, yo already not estoy."
Metal: Never confirma cual quema. The DM can decide (is sugiere Pewter or Steel) but must quedar ambiguo.
Role mecanico: NO is a PJ ally. Aparece in momentos clave of the Acto 3, absorbe 1 golpe letal against a PJ, does a attack strong to Maelor, and is retira at the aparecer the Inquisidor. No participa in turns normales.

The Steel Inquisitor
Voz: not speaks. Respira. A sonido metallic, humedo, as a maquina organica. Si says algo, is a sola frase with voz plana: "Vengan." or "No."
Description: high, delgado, with clavos of metal atravesando the eyes. Is moves with a violencia eficiente that not parece humana. The mist is aparta of the.
Role: NO is for pelear. Is for huir. The Inquisidor is the senal of that this conflicto already escalo more alla of lo that Fellise can contener. Their aparicion marks the cierre of the campaign and the necesidad of huir to Luthadel.
Mecanica: if algun PJ insiste in pelear, the Inquisidor has AC 20, +10 to attack, 150 HP and regeneracion. Is imbatible to level 3-5. The target is that lo entiendan in 1 round and corran.

4. Silen — system of reconocimiento and revelacion

Para that the revelacion of the kandra not is sienta injusta, the PJ not lo reconocen per the cara sino per firmas narrativas. Silen conserva habitos, a object and datos intimos of the crew because the absorbio of the Silen original. Sembralos from the session 0.

Firma of Silen
As is shows
Para that sirve
Frase codigo
"Primero mirar, after tocar" — the says at the dar instrucciones serias
Disparo of sospecha when the escuchan of boca of a "desconocido" in the Acto 2
Gesto repetido
Is acomoda the guante derecho with dos tirones cortos. Always before of say algo important
Reconocimiento visual not facial — works incluso if cambio of body
Objeto fijo
Moneda perforada that le dio Darven. The toca when is nervioso
Prueba dura that confirma identidad. Si a PJ examina the coin (Investigation DC 14), reconoce the marcas
Info impossible
Conoce apodos internos, anecdotas privadas, the name of the perro of the infancia of a PJ
Confirma that not is a espia comun: absorbio the recuerdos of the Silen original

5. Estructura of campaign extendida
