6. Contexto of the world for mesas that not leyeron the libros

Si your players Never leyeron Mistborn, not les expliques all of golpe. These conceptos is reveal during the campaign, when aparecen naturalmente. But vos as DM you need tenerlos claros for responder questions and sembrar clues.

Allomancy: algunas people nacen with the capability of quemar metals internamente for obtain powers. Tragan a metal (in way of virutas or liquido), lo queman mentalmente and obtienen a effect while dure the reserva. Each metal does algo diferente: Pewter da fuerza, Tin agudiza sentidos, Steel empuja metals, Iron the atrae, Zinc aviva emociones, Brass the calma, Copper oculta pulses alomanticos, Bronze the detecta. The Allomancy is genetica and during siglos fue exclusiva of the nobleza. Que a skaa the tenga is dangerous and secreto.

Skaa: the class low of the Final Empire. Basicamente esclavos without derechos legales. The nobles the poseen, the explotan and the descartan. The skaa viven in distritos sucios, trabajan in minas and fabricas, and not can mirar to a noble to the eyes. The tension skaa-noble is the fondo of all.

Lord Ruler: the dios-emperador that gobierna the Final Empire from does mil anos. Vive in Luthadel, the capital. Is inmortal, todopoderoso and omnipresente in the cultura. All the system legal, religioso and economico gira around the. Nadie lo ha desafiado and vivido. In is campaign not aparece, but their sombra is in each decision of the nobles.

Brumas and mist: each night, the mist cubre all. In this world has a componente sobrenatural: the alomanticos more poderosos is sienten conectados to ella. The people comun le has miedo. The Mistborn (seres that can quemar TODOS the metals) only existen in leyendas... or eso creen.

Kandra: creatures that can absorber the huesos of a person and copiar their way, voz, recuerdos and personalidad with precision casi perfecta. Trabajan mediante Contratos: acuerdos sagrados with a empleador. A kandra that rompe their Contrato is descastado and destruido per the suyos. Are rarisimos and the mayoria of the people ni knows that existen. Silen is uno.

Steel Inquisitors: the ejecutores more temidos of the Lord Ruler. Tienen clavos of metal atravesados in the body (especialmente the eyes) that les dan powers alomanticos multiples. Are practicamente inmortales, increiblemente fuertes and rapidos. Si a Inquisidor aparece in Fellise, significa that this asunto escalo to level imperial. The unica option is huir.

Obligadores: the burocracia religiosa of the Lord Ruler. Controlan comercio, registros and the ley. Tienen tatuajes in the cara according to their rango. Torren is a ex-obligador menor that deserto: eso lo does valioso and peligrosamente buscado.

Casas nobles: familias that compiten between if per power economico and politico low the mirada of the Lord Ruler. House Kest is a of muchas, ambiciosa but of rango medio. Maelor wants elevarla presentando the Kestium at the Lord Ruler.

Nota for the DM: not sueltes all is information of a time. Dejala gotear: when the PJs vean to alguien quemar Pewter, explicales lo minimo. When Silen is revele as kandra, there explicales that is a kandra with detail. When the Inquisidor aparezca, that the explicacion sea the cara of terror of the NPC more valiente.

7. Reactividad of classes — guia for the DM

This campaign is disenada for that CADA CLASE tenga momentos unicos of descubrimiento and protagonismo. To lo long of the actos vas to encontrar bloques marked SI HAY [CLASE] that describen lo that sucede when a PJ of that class uses their abilities in a scene.

As use these bloques:
- Antes of each session, revisa that classes there is in your table.
- Marca the bloques SI HAY that apply.
- No does falta that all is activen: the target is that CADA player tenga at the less 1-2 momentos unicos per session where their class reveals algo that nadie more podria descubrir.
- Si a player not active their ability espontaneamente, dale a clue: "Your instinto of [class] te says that algo not cuadra" or "Con your sentidos active, notes...".
- The descubrimientos per class are ADITIVOS: each class ve a pieza of the rompecabezas. Cuantas more classes distintas haya in the table, more complete is the imagen.

The 8 classes and their rol narrativo in is campaign:
- Pewter Brute: fuerza and resistance. Nota details fisicos (entrenamiento, peso, estructura corporal).
- Steel Marksman: precision ranged with metal. Nota metal oculto, angulos of tiro, municion improvisada.
- Iron Puller: control of metal ranged. Siente metal in people and objects, detecta anomalias metallic.
- Tin Lurcher: sentidos sobrehumanos. Escucha conversaciones lejanas, huele details ocultos, ve in the darkness.
- Zinc/Brass Soother: manipulacion emocional. Lee emociones reales, detecta mentiras emocionales, influye in NPCs.
- Copper Smoker: supresion Allomantic. Crea Nubes that ocultan at the group, note when algo NO reacciona to the supresion.
- Bronze Seeker: deteccion of pulses metallic. Escucha Allomancy active, detecta metals anomalos, rastrea per pulse.
- Mundane Specialist: without metal, pura ability. Conecta with NPCs skaa, knows the city without filtro Allomantic, note details humanos.

Regla of oro: each class deberia tener at the less UN moment per scene where piense "mi character can hacer algo that nadie more can". Eso is lo that does that the diversidad of classes importe.

8. Composicion of party — fallbacks and ajustes

Ninguna table va to tener the 8 classes. Aca you have as manejar the bloques SI HAY when falta a class critica.

If there's NO Bronze Seeker (the detector natural):
The deteccion of Silen and the Kestium loses their layer more directa. Compensacion: Torren les da a "detector of resonancia" improvisado — a frasco of virutas of metal suspendidas in oil that vibran near pulses anomalos. Funciona as Sabueso passive: the frasco tiembla when are cerca of the kandra or of the Kestium. No da the information detallada of a Sabueso, but mantiene the clues of deteccion activas.

If there's NO Tin Lurcher (the sensor of details):
The details sensoriales that the Acechador descubriria (respiracion rara of Silen, ecolalizacion in the canal) is lose. Compensacion: the obreros skaa and mendigos work as "sentidos ampliados" of the city — offer the same information but through dialogo in time of perception directa. "The type raro respiraba as if is lo recordara to if same."

If there's NO Zinc/Brass Soother (the lector emocional):
The capas emocionales of Silen and the traidores not is detectan pasivamente. Compensacion: uses Insight (WIS) in their place with DC 15. Cualquier PJ can intentarlo. Alternativamente, Darven does a comentario before of the traicion: "Silen is raro ultimamente. No me mira when speaks." The mentor percibe lo that the group not has tools for sentir.

If there's NO Copper Smoker (the nube protectora):
The group is rastreable per Sabuesos of Kest. Compensacion: Kaerin aparece MAS TEMPRANO (Acto 2 in time of only Acto 3) with a mensaje: "The are rastreando. No quemen metal in the street." Le da at the group the option of pedir to a NPC ally that the oculte or of avanzar sabiendo that the siguen (more tenso, more dangerous, reloj sube more fast).

If there's NO Iron Puller or Steel Marksman (without control metallic):
The entornos metallic lose interactividad. Compensacion: agregale mecanismos manuales — poleas, palancas, cuerdas — for that cualquier PJ pueda interactuar with chains and gates without Allomancy. The fundicion and the subsuelo deberian sentirse manipulables for all.

If there's NO Pewter Brute (without tanque):
The combates are more peligrosos; nadie aguanta golpes. Compensacion: dale more covers, more options of sigilo and more rutas of evitacion. The combates deberian power resolverse (or at the less simplificarse) with ingenio in time of fuerza. Valek in particular deberia power ser evitado with a Stealth grupal DC 14 in time of peleado.

If there's NO Mundane Specialist (without conexion skaa):
The NPCs skaa confian less — the group parece "alomanticos of fuera". Compensacion: Darven funcionaba as their bridge at the world skaa. Si murio, their name todavia abre doors: "Darven me dijo that if alguien venia of their part, the ayudara." The legado of the mentor.

Regla general: if a class not is in the table, reparti their funcion between NPCs allies, objects special or rolls of ability estandar (DC 14-15). Nunca dejes that the ausencia of a class bloquee contenido critico — only cambia COMO is descubre.

9. Filosofia of combat adaptable

The combat in Shadows over Fellise NO is D&D clasico. No is "mato monstruos and subo of level". Is a tool narrativa that crea tension, fuerza decisiones and recompensa the creatividad. The fights deberian sentirse as scenes of action in a pelicula of atracos: rapidas, sucias, with environment, and with options that not are only "ataco".

Principios of the combat adaptable:

1. TODA pelea has a salida not violenta. No always is facil, not always is better, but EXISTE. The matones of the muelle can ser sobornados. The traidores can ser persuadidos (parcialmente). Valek can dejarse convencer of irse. Only Maelor in fase 3 and the Inquisidor not negocian.

2. The environment is more important that the stats. A Dock Thug with AC 12 and 22 HP is trivial in campo abierto. Ponelo behind cover, about a catwalk unstable, with a barrel of oil between the and the group, and is a desafio tactico. The fights aburridas are culpa of the DM, not of the numeros.

3. The economia of MR define the ritmo. The PJs have 3 MR at level 1-3 and 5 MR at the level 4-6. Each ability costs 1-2 MR. To level 3 with only 3 MR, spend all in the primera pelea significa arrive at the boss without resources. To level 5 with 5 MR there is more margen but the overload is vuelve factor constante. The DM must disenar the ritmo of encuentros sabiendo cuantos MR has the group.

4. Fatigue is drama, not castigo. When a Bruto spends 2 MR in a turn and rolls CON for evitar Fatigue, that roll deberia sentirse IMPORTANTE. No the trivialices. Fatigue 2 in the moment equivocado cambia a pelea. Dejalo ser tenso.

5. The enemies reaccionan to the classes. A guard that ve to a Bruto quemar Pewter CAMBIA of estrategia. A traidor that siente the Nube of a Apagador enters in panico. The enemies inteligentes priorizan at the character more dangerous for ellos.

6. Each combat has a reloj interno. Despues of 3-4 rounds, algo CAMBIA: arrive refuerzos, the terrain is modifica, a NPC interviene, or the enemies intentan huir. The fights not deberian durar more of 5 rounds. Si duran more, the DM must forzar a cambio.

Guia of descansos cortos:
- Short rest = recover MITAD of MR max (redondeado arriba). Con 5 MR max, recover 3.
- Short rest toma ~1 hour of time of game. The DM must ofrecer the oportunidad but not forzarla.
- Fatigue 1 is limpia with short rest. Fatigue 2 needs long rest.
- Si the group arrives to Valek with less of 3 MR per PJ, dale a oportunidad of short rest (the tecnico that les dibuja the mapa the cubre 10 minutes, sufficient for a pausa narrativa).

Regla of the "point of not retorno":
When the group low at the subsuelo of the fundicion, not there is more descansos. From Valek until the end (Maelor + Inquisidor + huida), is TODO continuo. The PJs must gestionar their MR sabiendo that not van to recover more. Esto crea tension mecanica that is traduce in tension narrativa.

Si a PJ arrives at the combat with Maelor without MR:
No lo dejes inutil. The entornos interactivos (mesas, jaulas, cables, nodos) work without MR. The attacks with normal weapon siguen siendo validos. And the Momentum (that is gains with creatividad, not with metal) sigue siendo a tool poderosa. A PJ without MR that uses 3 Momentum for a effect cinematico is a of the mejores scenes that can tener a table.

Momentum in combat — guia fast:
Is gains Momentum (0-3) per: describir attacks creativos, using the environment cleverly, trabajar in equipment with another PJ, hacer algo inesperado. The DM grants 1 Momentum when the table reacciona with a "UHHH" or "that genial". Gastarlo: 1 = +1d4 to roll, 2 = reposicion extra, 3 = effect cinematografico (derribar, desarmar, romper cover, escapar of agarre). Nunca limites the creatividad of as is spends the 3er Momentum.

11. Escalado per tamano of group — formulas rapidas

The campaign is disenada for 4 PJs. Si the table has more or less, adjust:

3 PJs:
- Enemies menores: -1 enemy per encuentro Or -25% HP to each uno.
- Valek: HP 70 in time of 90. Sin action of guarida in fase 1.
- Maelor: HP 55/65/50 per fase. Pulses of area each 3 turns in time of 2.
- Short rest extra before of the subsuelo.

5 PJs:
- Enemies menores: +1 enemy per encuentro Or +20% HP.
- Valek: HP 110. Agrega 1 secuaz tecnico (AC 12, HP 15, only cierra valvulas).
- Maelor: HP 80/95/70 per fase. Agrega 1 pulse menor extra per round.
- Sin descanso extra (more PJs = more MR total).

6 PJs:
- All lo of 5 PJs + each boss has 1 action legendaria extra.
- Considerar agregar a enemy tematico unico per acto (a Sabueso of Kest that rastrea at the group, a maton of elite with 35 HP).

Level 3 vs level 5:
Si the group starts in level 3 (recomendado), the stats base are correctos. Si start in level 5 (or suben during the campaign), applies:
- +1 to impactar and DC of enemies.
- +10 HP to each enemy.
- Valek: +2 at the martillo, HP 110.
- Maelor: +1 to all, HP +15 per fase, nodos requieren DC +2 for desactivar.
- Agrega 1 Obrero Kestium as enemy menor in the laboratorio (AC 13, HP 20, attack +5, 1d6+3 Kestium).

ACT 0 — One-shot: The Warehouse Heist
This acto works as session introductoria. The players must sentir the city, know to the crew and ejecutar a golpe that is siente exitoso. All lo that pase aca does that the traicion of the Acto 1 duela more.

0.1 Apertura of Fellise — Texto of lectura in voz high

(Lee esto at the start of the session or parafrasea with your own estilo)

"The mist low temprano in Fellise. No is the mist romantca of the cuentos; is espesa, acida, with gusto to soot and metal quemado. Caminar per the Canal District is escuchar chains that arrastran carga, water estancada against piedra and the eco of botas of guard about adoquines desiguales. The farolas of oil apenas cortan tres meters of darkness. The skaa caminan fast, with the head low, because quedarse quieto in Fellise significa that alguien te is mirando."

Objetivo: pintar tone, not explain the world. No digas "the skaa are the class low of the Final Empire". Mostralo: a nino descalzo that vende chatarra, a guard that cobra peaje for cruzar a bridge, a noble that happens in carruaje cerrado without mirar to nadie.

ENTORNO DE Fellise (elementos interactivos generales)
Cadenas of carga: cuelgan of poleas between edificios. A Atractor can usarlas for moverse or derribar things. A Tirador can disparar about the eslabones for generar cascada of metal.
Canales: water sucia to level low. A Acechador can usarlos for moverse without ser visto. Caer costs 1d4 damage and a turn for exit.
Farolas of oil: romperlas generates darkness in 3 m. A Embaucador can use the darkness for acercarse without ser notado.
Barriles and boxes: cover media (+2 AC). A Bruto can arrojarlos (1d6+STR damage, DC 12 DEX for esquivar).
Tejados: accesibles with DEX (Acrobatics) DC 12. From arriba, +1d4 damage in attacks ranged and advantage in Perception.
Carros of carga: cover complete if te agachas. Pueden empujarse for bloquear callejones (STR DC 13).

0.2 Taberna Twisted Anvil — Presentacion of the crew

Description: taberna skaa in the Canal District. Techo low, madera oscurecida per the smoke, a barra of piedra gastada with marcas of cuchillo. The dueno (Bren, a ex-estibador with tres dedos less) not does questions.

Escena: the PJs arrive and encuentran to Darven and Silen in the table of the fondo. Microescenas for dar vida:
- A cobrador of deudas enters, mira the sala, localiza to alguien and lo saca to rastras. Nadie interviene.
- A noble menor with dos escoltas low to comprar algo that not wants that vean arriba. Lleva guantes blancos manchados of carbon.
- A rumor corre between the mesas: "Dicen that encontraron a metal new in the minas of Kest. Algo raro."
- A pelea menor estalla between dos bandas per the control of a muelle. Tres golpes and is acaba; the perdedor exits sangrando per the door.

Darven speaks few: "There is a trabajo. Paga well. Riesgo medio. Silen les explains the details." Luego is remains mirando their vaso.

ENTORNO DEL YUNQUE TORCIDO
Mesa heavy: can volcarse for cover (+2 AC). STR DC 10 for volcarla.
Barriles of cerveza: romper uno crea difficult terrain (liquido in 2x2 m).
Lampara of oil colgante: derribarla prende fire to a zone of 1,5 m (1d6 fire per turn).

Ventanas: rotas, with tablones flojos. DEX DC 12 for exit per a.

DESCUBRIMIENTOS POR CLASE EN LA TABERNA
These are extras opcionales that the DM active according to the classes presentes. Each uno da information unica or a advantage menor.

IF THERE'S A Pewter Brute: the cobrador of deudas mira at the Bruto and murmura "cuidado with that" at the exit. IF THERE'S A Tin Lurcher: with sentidos active, escucha a conversacion in the table more alejada about "the envio special of the Muelle 7". IF THERE'S A Zinc/Brass Soother: reads the emociones of the sala. The noble is aterrorizado — lo that compra not is per gusto, is chantaje. Also note that Silen has a layer emocional below the calma: algo contenido, as culpa anticipada. "Their calma is real, but debajo there is algo that not says." Micro-clue of the traicion futura.

Diez minutes where not there is nadie vigilando. Si alguien quisiera enter to a almacen, that seria the moment." Info: window of oportunidad that facilita the infiltracion.

0.3 Silen before of the golpe — Escena obligatoria

This is LA scene of plantado. All lo that Silen haga aca va to resonar when is revele as kandra.

Silen lleva to the PJs to a costado (the barra, the callejon, a table aparte) and low line:

"Darven speaks as if all fuera simple. No lo is. Nunca lo is."
(Pausa. Is acomoda the guante derecho with dos tirones.)
"No me importa if enter pateando the door or colandose per the canal. Me importa that vuelvan."
(Mira to each PJ.) "Primero mirar, after tocar."

Si le do Insight (DC 15): notan that Silen parece more preocupado of lo normal. No miente, but tampoco says all.

The DM must anotar with that PJ interactua more Silen. That PJ sera the that more sufra the revelacion.

LECTURA DE SILEN POR CLASE (Acto 0) — Semillas of the revelacion
These clues are SUTILES. No deberian alarmar sino acumularse. When llegue the Acto 2, the player va to pensar "already lo habia notado". That is the target.

IF THERE'S A Pewter Brute: note that Silen is moves with a fluidez rara — demasiado preciso for alguien of the street. Their centro of gravedad not cambia when gira, as if their body fuera a maquina well calibrada. "Is moves as if practicara each step." (The kandra have control muscular perfecto about their cuerpos adoptados.)

IF THERE'S A Steel Marksman: observa that Silen not lleva NINGUN metal encima. Ni a coin, ni a cuchillo, ni a hebilla. In Fellise, where all cargan algo of metal, eso is raro. "Is the unico type in is taberna that not has a only clip encima." (The kandra evitan metal for not ser detectados per Buscadores.)

IF THERE'S AN Iron Puller: not siente metal in Silen. Nada. "Is as attempt atraer aire." Esto not levanta alarmas todavia — there is people that not carga metal — but is acumula with futuras lecturas. Si insiste (Perception DC 16): "No is that not lleve metal. Is that their body not has the rastro metallic normal of a person."

IF THERE'S A Tin Lurcher: the steps of Silen not suenan as deberian. Their respiracion is demasiado regular, as if the estuviera controlando conscientemente in place of respirar naturalmente. "Respira as alguien that is recuerda to if same that has that respirar." (The kandra must simular procesos biologicos.)

IF THERE'S A Zinc/Brass Soother: the emociones of Silen are genuinas: is preocupa per the crew of verdad. But there is a segunda layer, more profunda, as a segundo game emocional debajo of the primero. "Is as if alguien MAS estuviera sintiendo AL MISMO TIEMPO that Silen." Si lo reads with cuidado (Insight DC 16): "There is culpa. Culpa per algo that todavia not step."

IF THERE'S A Copper Smoker: if active Nube casualmente, Silen not reacciona. The mayoria of the people siente a incomodidad sutil when is suprime the Allomancy in their zone (as a cambio of presion). Silen nada. "Is as if the Nube not le afectara in absoluto." (Because not is Allomancer — is a kandra.)

IF THERE'S A Bronze Seeker: the pulse Allomantic of Silen is... raro. No is a pulse humano normal ni Allomantic. Is a frecuencia tenue, casi inaudible, as a eco. "Algo in their pulse not cuadra, but not is per that. Is as escuchar a cancion conocida tocada in a instrumento equivocado." (The kandra have a firma of pulse atipica that a Sabueso experimentado not reconoceria.)

IF THERE'S A Mundane Specialist: note that the hands of Silen have callos in places extranos — not where the tendria a criminal of street that trepa, pelea and empuna cuchillos. The callos are where the tendria alguien that trabaja with tools of precision. "These hands not hicieron lo that says that hicieron." (The callos are of the body original absorbido; the habitos motores are of the kandra.)

0.4 Preparacion of the golpe — 3 rutas at the almacen

The almacen is in the Muelle 7, distrito portuario. Carga legal arriba (madera, tela, grano), carga ilegal abajo (metal, weapons, the Kestium without that nadie lo sepa still).

Ruta To — Frontal (fuerza): Entrar per the door main. Requiere neutralizar 2 guards (Dock Thug). Mecanica: Roll of group of Stealth DC 12, or combat directo.
Ruta B — Canal (infiltracion): Entrar per the gate of the canal that da at the sotano of the almacen. Requiere abrir the reja (Puzzle 1: Compuertas). Mas slow but silencioso.
Ruta C — Deception (social): Hacerse pasar per estibadores of the turn nocturno. Requiere Deception DC 13 and tener ropa apropiada (Street Craft or Contactos can proveerla).

Each ruta has a mini-target extra:
To: encontrar the manifiesto of carga (Libro of cargas — Puzzle 2).
B: not activar the trap of ruido in the gate.
C: convencer at the capataz of night of that the deje bajar at the sotano.

0.5 Almacen per fases

Fase 1 — Entrada: according to the ruta elegida, the PJs arrive at the interior of the almacen. Pisos of madera, pillars of piedra, carga apilada in estantes altos. 2 Warehouse Guards patrullan the segundo floor.

ENTORNO DEL ALMACEN
Estantes of carga: 3 m of high. Pueden escalarse (DEX DC 11) for gain altura. Derribarlos: STR DC 14, generates difficult terrain in 3x1.5 m and 2d6 damage to quien this abajo (DEX DC 13 for mitad).
Garfios and chains: cuelgan of the ceiling for move boxes. A Atractor can usarlos for bascular carga about enemies. A Tirador can balancearse with ellos.
Cajas of metal: cover media. Contienen chatarra. A Bruto can patear a as improvised weapon (1d8+STR).
Trampa of oil: there is a barrel of oil of maquina in the esquina noreste. Si is rompe and is prende, generates zone of fire (1d6/turn, area 3x3 m).
Ventanales altos: rotos, dejan enter the mist. Accesibles from the estantes. Sirven as escape or entrada alternativa.
Sotano: stairs trasera. Aca is the carga real.

Fase 2 — Nucleo: in the sotano, the PJs encuentran the carga special. Cajas marcadas with sello of House Kest (Investigation DC 12 for reconocerlo). Dentro: lingotes of a metal desconocido (Kestium, but the PJs not lo know still). Pesa more of lo that deberia. Brilla ligeramente in the darkness with a tone violeta apagado.

Fase 3 — Complicacion: when levantan the carga, suena a alarma silenciosa (alquimica — a hilo of metal is rompe). Llegan 3 Dock Thugs additional from the entrada. The PJs must escapar with the botin.

VENTAJAS POR CLASE EN EL ALMACEN
Momentos of protagonismo in the infiltracion. Each class has a advantage unica.

IF THERE'S A Pewter Brute: can silenciar to a guard of a only golpe without ruido (STR + Stealth DC 12 — the guard not grita, only is desploma). Si lo does well, the rest guards not is alertan. Momento cinematografico: is acerca per detras, a golpe, silencio.

IF THERE'S A Steel Marksman: from the estantes altos, has line of tiro perfecta to all the almacen. Primer attack with advantage. Also can lanzar a clavo or coin against a wall lejana for crear a seruelo sonoro (distrae to 1 guard, 1 round).

IF THERE'S AN Iron Puller: atrae the box of Kestium directamente without necesidad of cargarla manualmente. Additionally, siente that the metal dentro pesa more of lo normal and has a "textura" metallic that Never sintio. "This metal is diferente. No is to that, but not is as ninguno that haya atraido." Primer dato sensorial of the Kestium.

IF THERE'S A Tin Lurcher: escucha the respiraciones of all the guards of the edificio. Sabe exactamente where are, cuantos are and if alguno is dormido. Mapa mental complete of the planta. "Cuatro arriba, uno dormido next to the door this." Inteligencia tactica that beneficia to all the group.

IF THERE'S A Zinc/Brass Soother: can avivar the miedo of a guard for that abandone their puesto (Zinc, DC 12). The guard is va nervioso "to chequear algo" and not vuelve per 10 minutes. Sin combat, without ruido, without evidencia.

IF THERE'S A Copper Smoker: detecta the alarma alquimica of the sotano before of that suene. "There is algo metallic active in the ground — a hilo sensor. Si lo cruzan, is active." Puede crear Nube for suprimir the reaction alquimica (1 MR) and evitar the alarma completamente. Si the alarma not suena, the 3 Matones of the Fase 3 not arrive.

IF THERE'S A Bronze Seeker: localiza the Kestium per their pulse without necesidad of buscarlo fisicamente. "This in the tercera box from the izquierda, sotano, fila of the fondo." Sabe exactamente where is and note algo inquietante: "This metal pulsa. As a corazon. Nunca senti algo like this." Primera clue about the naturaleza unica of the Kestium.

IF THERE'S A Mundane Specialist: knows the rutina of the muelles because the skaa the viven. Sabe that the cambio of turn has a gap of 10 minutes where the guards new todavia not llegaron and the viejos already is fueron. Entrada no roll of Stealth during that window. Also reconoce the sello of House Kest in the boxes (Investigation automatic): "Kest. Fundicion new, ambiciosa. Mi viejo laburo there seis meses before of that le rompieran the hands."

0.6 Escape — 3 options

Opcion To — Persecucion: correr hacia the canal. Roll perseguida of group (3 rounds of checks alternos: DEX, STR, INT). Each failure adds a enemy that the alcanza.
Opcion B — Ocultamiento: esconderse in the mist with the carga. Stealth grupal DC 13. Si the Apagador/Copper active Nube, advantage automatic.
Opcion C — Sacrificio of botin: if the thing is pone fea, can soltar part of the carga for distraer to the perseguidores. Pierden the mitad of the pago but escapan limpio.

Cierre of the Acto 0: the PJs vuelven to the taberna. Darven sonrie (the unica time that lo ven genuinamente contento). Each PJ receives their pago: 50 coronas. Silen says: "Buen trabajo. The next va to ser more interesante." And is acomoda the guante.

Gancho at the Acto 1: alguien more estaba atento to that carga. The note that encontraron (or not) in the almacen tenia sello of House Kest. Lo that robaron not era chatarra: era a envio experimental that alguien va to extranar.

0.7 The manana after — Transicion at the Acto 1 (scene obligatoria)
Usar in: at the start of the Sesion 2, before of start the Acto 1. Ambienta the days between golpes.

"Amanece and the mist is retira. The crew is in the guarida of Darven — a sotano behind a tintoreria of the canal. The boxes of the almacen are in a esquina, cubiertas per a lona."

Darven examina the Kestium and not knows that is: "Nunca vi this metal. No is Pewter, not is Steel, not is nada that conozca. But pesa as plomo and brilla as if estuviera vivo."
Silen sugiere guardarlo: "No lo movamos todavia. Si alguien busca esto, vender fast is the worse idea." (In realidad, Silen wants that Maelor sepa where is for recuperarlo.)

A PJ observador (Perception DC 13) note that the muelles are more vigilados that ayer: patrullas new, a par of types preguntando in the mercado. The golpe dejo huella.
Si preguntan to contactos of the street: "House Kest is moviendo people. Alguien les robo algo important and the viejo Kest is furioso."

IF THERE'S A Bronze Seeker: the Kestium in the boxes emite a pulse tenue and constante, as a latido dormido. "This metal is vivo. No is as explicarlo."
IF THERE'S A Tin Lurcher: escucha conversaciones in the street about "the incendio of the almacen" and "the types that entraron per the ceiling." The crew already has name in the muelles.

This is the ultimo moment of calma. Despues arrives the reunion of the Acto 1 and all is rompe.

Escenas enchufables of the Acto 0 (unicas)
- [Trigger: caminando per the muelles, pre-almacen] A patrulla of guard of the puerto short the step and exige documentos or soborno (5-10 coronas). Si the PJs pelean, the patrullas futuras are alerta.
- [Trigger: post-almacen, volviendo with the carga] A nino skaa intenta robarle a lingote to a PJ while caminan per the muelle. Si lo persiguen, the lleva to a callejon where vive with other huerfanos. Darles comida or coins abre a informante futuro.
- [Trigger: persecucion/escape, if you need alargar] A derrumbe parcial in a edificio viejo bloquea a callejon. Is can escalar (DEX DC 12), rodear (+5 minutes) or limpiar (STR DC 14, does ruido).
- [Trigger: pre-golpe, if the PJs investigan in the muelle] A vendedor of chatarra in the mercado nocturno says that vio cargas raras arrive at the Muelle 7 "with escolta of nobles". Pide 15 coronas per the dato complete. The dato is real.

ACT 1 — Betrayal and Crew Fracture
The point emocional more strong of the campaign. Darven falls, the crew is rompe and the PJs remain solos with questions. Hacelo doler.

1.1 Tiempo of gloria — Texto of lectura in voz high

"Han pasado some days from the golpe. The pago fue bueno, Darven is more relajado of lo that lo vieron Never, and the crew has that brillo of equipment that works. Silen organizo a reunion for speak of the next movement. The place: the viejo deposito of the street Morada, where always is juntaron. There is comida, there is bebida, and there is that sensacion of that the things at the fin van well."

Dale to the players a moment for disfrutar. Que cuenten that do with the plata, that hablen between ellos. This calma is the contraste that you need.

Silen llama aparte to a PJ (the that more confie in the) and le says algo personal: "Pase lo that pase, quiero that sepas that this group is lo more real that tuve in mucho time." Esto is verdad, and is lo that does that the traicion sea tragica.

1.2 Pistas of traicion — Sala preparada (Puzzle 3)

When the PJs arrive at the deposito, a PJ observador can notar:
- The barrels are in posiciones of cover, not of almacenamiento (Perception DC 13).
- There is weapons below a manta that not estaban before (Investigation DC 12).
- A bolsa of plata new — demasiado new for skaa — asoma behind a pillar (Perception DC 14).
- The salida trasera is destrabada per dentro (Investigation DC 11).
- Falta people: dos members menores of the crew not vinieron.

Si detectan 2+ clues: not the sorprenden. Si detectan 0-1: the traidores actuan primero.

DETECCION DE EMBOSCADA POR CLASE
Each class has a way unica of notar that algo is badly. These are ADICIONALES to the clues genericas of the section 1.2.

IF THERE'S A Pewter Brute: the disposicion of the barrels restringe the movement — forman a embudo. Para alguien acostumbrado to pelear, is obvio: "Esto not is a deposito. Is a trap. The barrels are puestos for acorralarnos." Alerta automatic no roll.

IF THERE'S A Steel Marksman: analiza the lineas of tiro instintivamente. The traidores have cover preparada; the PJs not. "Nos pusieron where somos blanco facil. The covers are of the side of ellos, not of the nuestro." Alerta automatic.

IF THERE'S AN Iron Puller: siente metal fresco and afilado below the mantas — hojas without oxido, recien compradas. "Weapons new. Ayer not estaban aca." Deteccion automatic that confirma sospecha without necesidad of roll.

IF THERE'S A Tin Lurcher: (already has deteccion of olor of oil of weapon). Additionally escucha a corazon acelerado behind a pilar. "Alguien is nervioso. MUY nervioso. Escondido behind the tercera pillar." Puede senalar at the traidor more weak — the that quiza dude.

IF THERE'S A Zinc/Brass Soother: the ambiente emocional of the sala is saturado of tension and codicia. Puede identificar at the traidor more emocional and senalarlo: "ESE. Tiene culpa and gloria mezcladas. This type nos vendio." Si lo amorigua with Brass (DC 12), that traidor not pelea in the primera round (is congela).

IF THERE'S A Copper Smoker: the sala is siente amplificada, as if alguien estuviera quemando Zinc for avivar the tension of the group. Nota the manipulacion emocional: "Alguien is usando Allomancy in is sala for ponernos nerviosos." Si active Nube, the effect is cancela and the traidores lose their advantage of sorpresa emocional.

IF THERE'S A Bronze Seeker: the pulses metallic in the sala not cuadran with a reunion normal. There is MAS metal of the that is ve: weapons escondidas, a chain below a table, cuchillos in botas. Puede contar exacto: "Seis. There is seis weapons escondidas in is sala that not deberian estar aca."

IF THERE'S A Mundane Specialist: the door trasera is destrabada. A Mundano that knows the deposito knows that SIEMPRE is trabada — Darven same the traba per seguridad. "Alguien abrio the door per dentro. Eso not is descuido. Is ruta of escape." Alerta automatic.

ENTORNO DEL DEPOSITO
Columnas of piedra: cover complete. Is can use for emboscadas or flanqueo.
Barriles of madera: cover media. Contienen water or grano. Revientan with 10 HP of damage.
Mesa large central: volcarla da cover media to 2 people (STR DC 10).
Escalera at the altillo: DEX DC 10 for subir. From arriba: advantage to attacks ranged, but without cover.
Lampara of oil in the ceiling: derribarla (attack to AC 12) prende fire to the table and generates luz brillante + smoke.
Puerta trasera: destrabada. Sale to a callejon oscuro with acceso at the canal.
Ventanas tapiadas: is can romper (STR DC 13) for exit. The caida from the primer floor is of 3 m (1d6 damage).
Sacos of grano: is can arrojar for cegar or derribar (attack improvisado, DC 12 DEX for esquivar).

1.3 Discusion tensa — Roleo before of the combat

NO inicies with roll of initiative. The traicion starts with palabras.

Entran 4 figuras armadas. The mayoria are members of the crew that the PJs know. Uno of ellos (the Veteran Traitor, llamalo Rask) speaks:

Rask: "Denos the metal and esto ends without more sangre."
Darven (is for lentamente): "Companeros not arrive armados to cobrar."
Rask: "Nos ofrecieron plata and power. Esto already estaba decidido."

Opciones of the PJs:
Si negocian: Rask pide the Kestium, the entrega of Darven, or a retirada humillante. No there is option buena.
Si intentan persuadir: CHA (Persuasion) DC 16 for that 1 traidor dude and baje the weapon. No evita the pelea but reduce enemies in 1.
Si atacan primero: the traidores is repliegan to the covers that already tenian preparadas.
Si esperan demasiado: Rask da the senal and atacan.

1.4 Combat of traicion in dos tiempos

Tiempo 1 — Pelea cerrada: 3-4 Traidores veteranos + Rask (use stats of Veteran Traitor with +5 HP). Rask intenta arrive to Darven. The PJs must defender to Darven Or at the Kestium.
IMPORTANTE: not is can defender ambos. Si protegen to Darven, a traidor huye with part of the Kestium. Si protegen the Kestium, Darven receives a golpe critico.

Tiempo 2 — Caos and huida: after of 3 rounds or when fall 2 traidores, Rask intenta huir with lo that tenga. The PJs can perseguirlo (Rask knows the zone and has advantage in the primera round of persecucion). Si lo atrapan, suelta the carga but is niega to speak of quien lo contrato ("Van to matarme of all formas").

DISENO ADAPTABLE DEL COMBATE DE TRAICION

Antes of that the combat empiece, the DM decide 3 things:

1. Objetivo oculto: the traidores want the Kestium, not necesariamente kill. Si consiguen the metal, intentan irse. Si the bloquean, pelean to death. Esto cambia the tactica: the traidores priorizan ACCESO to the carga, not damage at the group.

2. Darven as variable: Darven has HP 25, AC 13, attack +4. Puede absorber 1-2 golpes before of fall. The DM decide before if Darven dies, sobrevive herido, or depends of the actions of the PJs:
- Si ningun PJ protege to Darven activamente: falls at the end of the round 2.
- Si 1+ PJ is posiciona next to Darven: Darven sobrevive the 2 primeras rounds. Cae in the round 3 only if the traidores lo priorizan.
- Si a PJ spends resources significativos defendiendolo (Bruto Brutal Endurance, Atractor Defensive Pull, etc.): Darven sobrevive the combat but remains in 1 HP.
Esto da AGENCIA — the players sienten that their decisiones determinaron if Darven vive or dies.

3. Tension of the doble target: only can proteger to Darven Or at the Kestium. Si protegen ambos, the traidores rompen a window and huyen (gain info about House Kest of all formas but lose the satisfaccion of atrapar to Rask). The DM NO deberia resolve esto per ellos — dejalo in the table.

Rask as mini-jefe:
Rask is INTELIGENTE. Usa cover, repliegue, and knows the deposito. Si is perdiendo:
- Ronda 1-2: pelea agresivo but listo. Always behind cover.
- Ronda 3: intenta huir. Tiene preparada the door trasera.
- Si lo acorralan: offers information. "Les digo quien me contrato if me dejan ir." (Dice the verdad: fue a intermediario of House Kest, not Maelor directamente.)
- Si le do Insight DC 14: "No knows all. No knows that Silen is involucrado. Le vendieron the traicion as 'a trabajo of protection for a noble'."

MOMENTOS DE CLASE EN COMBATE (Acto 1)
Each class has a action special unica during the pelea of traicion.

IF THERE'S A Pewter Brute: can arrojar the table central as proyectil hacia Rask (STR DC 13, 2d6 bludgeoning + derribo) in a sola action. Momento cinematografico that cambia the positioning of the combat.

IF THERE'S A Steel Marksman: can disparar the lampara of oil of the ceiling (AC 12, tiro automatic to that ranged) for crear a incendio that divide the sala in dos. The traidores of the side equivocado remain aislados 1 round.

IF THERE'S AN Iron Puller: can atraer TODAS the weapons escondidas of golpe (spends 2 MR, area 6 m). The traidores that dependian of those weapons remain desarmados. Action epica but costosa that can cambiar the combat entero.

IF THERE'S A Tin Lurcher: can rastrear to Rask incluso when huye in the darkness or the smoke. Persecucion without disadvantage. Si Rask escapa of other, not escapa of a Acechador with sentidos active.

IF THERE'S A Zinc/Brass Soother: can amortiguar (Brass, DC 13) the coraje of a traidor, haciendolo rendirse inmediatamente. "Suelta the weapon. No vale the pena." Reduce enemies in 1 without violencia.

IF THERE'S A Copper Smoker: if crea Nube in the centro of the deposito, cualquier effect Allomantic of the traidores is cancela. Additionally, the traidores not can rastrear to the PJs with Bronze during the pelea.

IF THERE'S A Bronze Seeker: during the caos, detecta the coin perforada of Silen fall at the floor. Nota the ubicacion exacta. "Algo metallic cayo of Silen during the pelea. Tiene a pulse that reconozco — lo escuche each time that estuve near the." Evidencia fisica of the identidad of Silen.

IF THERE'S A Mundane Specialist: knows the deposito better that the traidores. Sabe that there is a panel falso behind the boxes of the fondo that lleva to a space estrecho. Puede flanquear per sorpresa (advantage in primer attack) or usarlo for sacar to Darven herido of the combat.

Silen during the pelea: if Silen is presente, pelea DEL LADO of the PJs. Esto is clave: their traicion todavia not is revelo. Pelea well, protege to a PJ, and when all ends, is the primero in ir to ver to Darven.

1.5 Aftermath emocional — Texto of lectura in voz high

"The polvo is asienta. There is sangre in the floor, cristales rotos and the eco of the ultimos gritos todavia rebota in the walls. Darven is in the ground."

Si Darven dies: their ultimas palabras are for the PJ that more desarrollo relacion with the. Algo personal, not heroico. "Sabia that esto iba to pasar. Only esperaba that not fuera hoy." Or simplemente: "Cuida to the pibes."

Si Darven sobrevive (gravemente herido): remains outside combat per the resto of the campaign. Is convierte in a resource narrativo: da consejos from a cama improvisada, but already not lidera.

Lo that remains:
- Fragmentos of Kestium (the mitad or less of lo that tenian).
- A note quemada in the bolsillo of Rask with sello of House Kest.
- The coin perforada of Silen in the floor (is le cayo during the pelea). Si a PJ the recoge, va to reconocerla luego.
- Rabia and questions: quien contrato to the traidores? Que is realmente this metal?

DESCUBRIMIENTOS POST-COMBATE POR CLASE
Each class encuentra a pieza diferente of the rompecabezas. Cuantas more classes there is, more complete is the imagen.

IF THERE'S A Pewter Brute: examina at the traidor caido — note that their musculos show a entrenamiento profesional, not of street. "To this type lo entreno alguien with plata. No is a rata of muelle." Pista: House Kest invirtio in entrenar to the traidores.

IF THERE'S A Steel Marksman: in the bolsillos of a traidor encuentra 3 proyectiles of a metal raro — fragmentos of Kestium usados as municion. "Esto not is acero. Brilla raro. And pesa more of lo that deberia." Pista: House Kest distribuye Kestium as pago/weapon.

IF THERE'S AN Iron Puller: after of the combat, siente a resonancia metallic lejana hacia the sur — direction of the fundicion. "Algo large is there. Mucho metal in movement, and debajo... that pulse raro that senti in the boxes. But multiplicado." Pista: the fundicion is the fuente.

IF THERE'S A Tin Lurcher: in the note quemada of Rask, can reconstruir parcialmente the text usando olfato (the tinta has composicion quimica detectable) and tacto (the letras dejaron surcos). Lee fragmentos: "...entregar at the kandra..." and "...Maelor espera..." Primera mencion of the palabra kandra if nadie the knows.

IF THERE'S A Zinc/Brass Soother: the traidor herido or amortigado confiesa emocionalmente: "The type with guantes finos nos pago with a metal violeta. Lo quemas and te sentis invencible. Nos prometio more if haciamos the trabajo." Pista: Maelor uses Kestium as soborno/droga.

IF THERE'S A Copper Smoker: if recoge the coin perforada of Silen, note algo extrano: not has resonancia Allomantic residual. Normalmente the metal that alguien carga mucho time absorbe a "eco" of their firma. This coin is limpia, as if quien the usara not tuviera conexion with the Allomancy. "Esto me molesta. Silen the tenia always encima but is as if Never the hubiera tocado a Allomantic."

IF THERE'S A Bronze Seeker: lo that already detecto during the pelea (the coin) + additionally note that the pulse of the Kestium that cargan is cambiando. "When salimos of the almacen estaba estable. Ahora late more fast. Is is excitando. And late more strong when miro hacia..." (senala hacia the fundicion). The Kestium resuena with their fuente.

IF THERE'S A Mundane Specialist: reconoce the sello of House Kest in the note. Sabe per experiencia of street that House Kest is a casa new, ambiciosa, with a fundicion in the Industrial District that has fama of "place of the that not is vuelve". "Mi viejo laburaba in the minas of Kest. A day dejaron of pagarnos and dijeron that the mina is habia agotado. Mentira. Encontraron algo and nos rajaron." Contexto narrativo.

Transicion at the Acto 2: Silen (or their recuerdo if already desaparecio) sugiere buscar to alguien that sepa of metals raros. Menciona to a experto in the Market District.

Escenas enchufables of the Acto 1 (unicas)
- [Trigger: post-combat, if you need estirar] A vecino skaa vio the pelea and amenaza with avisar to the guard if not le dan 20 coronas. Si lo convencen (Persuasion DC 12), les da info: "Vi to Rask reunirse with a type with guantes finos does dos noches."
- [Trigger: post-combat, before of the transicion at the Acto 2] A member menor of the crew that not traiciono aparece frightened. Quiere irse of Fellise but has deudas. Si lo ayudan (30 coronas or a favor), les cuenta that Rask mencionaba "the casa large of the metal".
- [Trigger: if the session va fast and you need tension extra] A guard corrupto arrives to cobrar protection regular. Si le pagan (10 coronas), not does questions. Si not le pagan, vuelve with refuerzos in a hour.

ACT 2 — Kestium, Expert, and Silen's Revelation

2.1 Experto in metals — Torren the alquimista

Torren vive in a taller escondido behind a lavanderia in the Market District. Is a ex-obligador menor that deserto, viejo, paranoico and brillante. No atiende to desconocidos: the PJs necesitan a contacto, a recomendacion or a demostracion of that know of metals.

Entrada: Torren uses a mirilla and pide that le muestren lo that traen before of abrir. Si ven the Kestium, is remains in silencio a buen rato.

Si say the verdad: "House Kest. Por supuesto. Llevan anos buscando algo like this."

Informacion that can dar:
- The Kestium is a metal unstable. No is ninguno of the metals alomanticos conocidos. Podria ser a aleacion experimental or algo completamente new.
- Consumirlo without know that does is suicida. The sintomas of exposicion include venas oscurecidas, temblores and pulses metallic erraticos.
- Si alguien quemara Kestium, the effects serian impredecibles: podria amplificar a metal existente, generar a pulse destructivo or simplemente kill at the usuario.
- House Kest has a fundicion with a subsuelo that nadie ve. Ahi is where probablemente lo procesan.

Escena interactiva — The prueba of the criterio (Puzzle 4): Torren pone 3 muestras of metal about the table (a pura, a contaminada, a falsa) and pide that elijan cual is segura of analizar. No there is answer "correcta" mecanica: recompensa the razonamiento. A PJ that explique per that elige (peso, brillo, estabilidad) gains the confianza of Torren.

ENTORNO DEL TALLER DE TORREN
Mesa of trabajo: cubierta of instrumentos, crisoles, balanzas of precision. Si is vuelca, generates difficult terrain of cristal.

2.4 Canal subterraneo — Mini dungeon

The Old Canal is a system of drenaje low Fellise that conecta the distrito portuario with the zone industrial. Silen/kandra lo uses as refugio because pocos lo know and has multiples salidas.

Layout: corredor of piedra humeda with water until the tobillos. Bifurcaciones each 30 m. Pasarelas of metal oxidado cruzan the canal in 3 points. The mist is filtra from arriba.

ENTORNO DEL CANAL VIEJO
Agua estancada: difficult terrain for movement. The that corran do ruido (Stealth with disadvantage).
Pasarelas of metal: algunas are falsas (Puzzle 5 — "Lo new miente"). The reales are oxidadas and desgastadas. The new fueron puestas as trap: soportan peso 1 round and luego ceden (DEX DC 13 for saltar, or 1d6 damage + fall at the water).
Compuertas of metal: can cerrarse for bloquear pasillos. STR DC 15 for abrir to the fuerza, or a Atractor can manipularlas ranged.
Tuberia of steam: corre per the ceiling. Si is rompe (attack to AC 10, 5 HP), libera steam in area 3x3 m: 1d4 damage fire + vision reduced 1 round.
Nichos in the walls: escondites naturales. Stealth DC 10 for esconderse in uno.
Ratas (muchas): not are peligrosas, but do ruido when alguien happens cerca. A Tin Lurcher can use their sentidos for "escuchar" where there is movement humano vs ratas.

Navegacion: 3 sections with layout definido.

Layout of the Old Canal:
Seccion 1 — Entrada (from the muelle): corredor recto of 30 m, gates cerradas at the end (STR DC 15 or Atractor). Agua until the tobillos. 2 nichos to the sides (escondites). Si the group does ruido, 2 matones of the canal investigan from the Seccion 2.
Seccion 2 — Bifurcacion with catwalks: the canal is abre in dos ramales. Ramal izquierdo has the catwalks falsas (Puzzle 5 — "Lo new miente"). Ramal derecho is more long but seguro. There is a mendigo durmiendo in a nicho that can dar info if lo despiertan without asustarlo.
Seccion 3 — Camara of Silen: the canal is ensancha in a camara natural of 9x9 m. Piedras large, water quieta, eco. A salida at the costado sube to a callejon (ruta of escape of Silen). Silen espera sentado in a piedra central.

In each section, a chequeo of Survival or Investigation DC 12 for seguir the path correcto. Each failure adds a encuentro menor (2 Dock Thugs that usan the canal as step) or a danger ambiental (gate that is cierra).

NAVEGACION DEL CANAL POR CLASE (Acto 2)
The Old Canal favorece to ciertas classes of formas unicas.

IF THERE'S A Pewter Brute: can ABRIR the gates cerradas to the fuerza (STR DC 14 in time of the DC 15 normal — their Pewter le da advantage in resistance sostenida). Crea atajos directos where other tendrian that rodear.

IF THERE'S A Steel Marksman: dispara clavos or coins against the walls of piedra for crear agarres improvisados. The group can trepar per a derrumbe that of another way requeriria a rodeo. Also elimina ratas of a pasillo with a disparo in abanico: Stealth of the group not is rompe.

IF THERE'S AN Iron Puller: siente the diferencia between the catwalks oxidadas (metal envejecido, heavy) and the new (metal liviano, without historia). "The oxidadas are well. The that brillan are traps — are only apoyadas, not atornilladas." Resuelve the Puzzle 5 automatically.

IF THERE'S A Tin Lurcher: ecolocacion improvisada with sentidos active. Sabe that bifurcacion lleva adonde Silen is esperando without necesidad of rolls of Survival or Investigation. Mapa mental complete. "To the izquierda. Oigo water more quieta and a respiracion controlada. Is there."

IF THERE'S A Zinc/Brass Soother: encuentra to a mendigo that vive in the canal — a viejo frightened and paranoico. Con Brass (DC 11, amoriguar their miedo) the mendigo is calma and dibuja the path with the dedo in the barro: where are the traps, where the water sube, and where is esconde "the type raro that cambia of cara". (The mendigo VIO to Silen cambiar of body.)

IF THERE'S A Bronze Seeker: detecta the fuente of the pulse anomalo of Silen more adelante. Sabe exactamente in that camara is esperando, to cuanta ranged, and if is only. "This to 40 meters, camara amplia. Only. Sin metal encima. Is the." Navegacion directa without checks.

IF THERE'S A Mundane Specialist: the skaa usan the canales viejos as step seguro from does generaciones. A Mundano knows the rutas, knows where is seguro pisar and where not. The corazon emocional of the campaign. No the apures.

ACT 3 — Foundry, Underground, and Finale
The climax. The tone cambia of thriller criminal to horror industrial. The fundicion of House Kest is a bestia of metal, fire and sufrimiento. Lo that encuentran abajo deberia asustarlos before of arrive to Maelor.

3.1 Llegada to the fundicion — Texto of lectura in voz high

"The fundicion of House Kest is levanta as a catedral of hierro in the Industrial District. Tres chimeneas vomitan smoke negro that is mezcla with the mist. The ruido is constante: chains, martillos, furnaces, and below all, a zumbido low that is siente in the dientes. The skaa that trabajan aca enter at the amanecer and exit when the dejan. Algunos not exit."

The fundicion has dos levels visibles (planta of produccion and oficinas) and a subsuelo that oficialmente not existe.

ENTORNO DE LA FUNDICION (planta main)
Hornos industriales: pillars of fire of 2 m. Acercarse to 1.5 m without protection = 1d6 fire/turn. Is can manipular for crear cortinas of calor (+2 AC against attacks ranged to traves of the furnace).
Cadenas of produccion: chains pesadas that move carga. A Atractor can usarlas for moverse fast (bonus action, 6 m of movement extra). Cortar a chain (AC 12, 15 HP) generates effect cascada: all lo that cuelga falls (DEX DC 14 or 3d6 damage bludgeoning).
Pasarelas of metal: conectan the levels. Angostas (1 person). Advantage to attacks ranged from arriba. Si is derriban (STR DC 16 or damage estructural), quien this encima falls (2d6 damage).
Vapor of escape: the valvulas liberan steam periodicamente. A Acechador with Tin can predecir when (Perception DC 12). Estar in the zone when exits: 1d4 fire + vision reduced.
Herramientas of trabajo: martillos, tenazas, barras. Weapons improvisadas: 1d8+STR (martillo heavy), 1d6+STR (tenazas).
Cajas of mineral: apiladas. Cover media. Si is derriban about alguien: 2d6 bludgeoning, DEX DC 13 for mitad.

3.2 Entrada and mini-targets

The PJs eligen ruta of entrada and must completar at the less 2 of 3 mini-targets before of bajar at the subsuelo:

Objetivo To — Acceso: conseguir llave, sello or codigo for the door of the subsuelo. Opciones: robar at the capataz of turn (Sleight of Hand DC 14), convencer to a obrero desesperado (Persuasion DC 13 + incentivo), or forzar the cerradura (Herramientas DC 16).
Objetivo B — Alarma: desactivar or enganar the system of alerta metallic. Opciones: a Apagador can crear Coppercloud (automatic if spends 1 MR), a Sabueso can detectar and evitar the points of lectura (Investigation DC 13), or can romper the cable (Stealth DC 14 + Herramientas DC 12).
Objetivo C — Informacion: obtain a plano or guia of the subsuelo. Opciones: interrogar to a tecnico (Intimidation DC 14 or Persuasion DC 15), encontrar the plano in the oficina of the capataz (Investigation DC 13), or seguir the tuberias of steam (Survival DC 14).

Si completan 3 of 3: entrada without complicaciones, Valek not is preprado.
Si completan 2 of 3: entrada with 1 complicacion (patrulla extra, door trabada, alarma parcial).
Si completan 1 or 0: Valek knows that vienen. Prepara the subsuelo.

OPCIONES POR CLASE EN LOS MINI-OBJETIVOS
Additionally of the options genericas, each class has a atajo or advantage unica.

IF THERE'S A Pewter Brute: Objetivo To alternativo — arranca the door of the subsuelo directamente (STR DC 18). Funciona but is RUIDOSO: llena 1 segmento of the reloj of House Kest. Dramatico and efectivo if not les importa the subtlety.

IF THERE'S A Steel Marksman: Objetivo B alternativo — dispara the nodos of the system of alarma from ranged (3 tiros, AC 14 each uno). Si acierta the 3, the system is desactiva silenciosamente. Elegante.

IF THERE'S A Zinc/Brass Soother: Objetivo To alternativo — aviva the desesperacion of the capataz Hendel with Zinc (DC 12) for that entregue the llave voluntarily: "No puedo more. Tomen esto and haganle mierda to lo of abajo." Sin violencia, without deception, only emocion. Para Objetivo C: reads the emociones of the obreros for encontrar at the that knows MAS (the more aterrorizado is the that more vio).

IF THERE'S A Tin Lurcher: for Objetivo C, not needs interrogar ni buscar planos. Con sentidos active, mapea the tuberias of steam per sonido and the sigue until the subsuelo. Crea a mapa mental better that the fisico. "The tuberias bajan in tres levels. The ultimo vibra diferente — there there is maquinas pesadas."

IF THERE'S A Mundane Specialist: Maren (the obrera) is acerca SOLO if ve to a Mundano. "Sos of the nuestros? The that bajan not vuelven iguales." Si aceptan ayudarla, da information of the 3 targets: has a copia of the llave (Obj To), knows where are the sensores (Obj B) and knows the rutas of the subsuelo per experiencia (Obj C). A only contacto desbloquea all.

3.3 Fundicion viva — Escenas of roleo

Antes of bajar, dale at the group scenes sociales in the planta:

The capataz of turn (Hendel): type cansado that only wants end their jornada. No is leal to Kest; is leal to their salario. Si lo tratan well, suelta info: "No bajes at the subsuelo. Lo that do there abajo not is fundicion."
Obreros skaa: agotados, asustados. Uno (Maren) is acerca if ve to a Mundano: "Sos of the nuestros? Necesitamos ayuda. The that bajan at the subsuelo not vuelven iguales."

3.4 Subsuelo and Valek — Mini-jefe with environment

Description: the subsuelo is a laberinto of corredores metallic, tuberias of steam and salas of procesamiento. The aire is caliente and humedo. The luces are rojas (lamparas of seguridad industrial). All vibra with a zumbido constante that viene of more abajo.

ENTORNO DEL SUBSUELO
Tuberias of steam (Puzzle 7 — "Nunca purgar from frio"): tres levels of presion. Si is purgan badly, explotan (2d6 fire in area 3x3 m) and generate difficult terrain. Si is purgan well (ALTO -> MEDIO -> BAJO), abren the acceso without danger.
Compuertas of metal: Valek can cerrarlas as reaction (1 per turn). A Atractor can mantenerlas abiertas (chequeo opuesto STR vs DC 14). A Bruto can forzarlas (STR DC 16).
Pasarelas about the vacio: conectan salas about a caida of 6 m at the level inferior. Caer = 3d6 damage. The catwalks is can volcar (STR DC 14) for crear rampas improvisadas or roll to quien this encima.
Iluminacion roja: all has penalizacion of vision reduced to more of 9 m. A Acechador with Tin ignora esto. Destruir the lamparas generates darkness total.
Conductos of ventilacion: a character small or with DEX DC 14 can meterse for flanquear or escapar. Conectan salas adyacentes.
Charcos of oil industrial: difficult terrain. Si is prenden = fire persistente (1d6/turn, dura 3 rounds).

Encuentro with Valek:
Valek not the espera in a sala abierta. The espera in SU sala: a cruce of 4 pasillos where the controla the gates, the steam and the luces.

Valek: "No deberian estar aca."
Si speak: "No me importa quien the mando. To mi me pagan for that this place funcione. And works."
Si preguntan per the experimentos: "Yo not pregunto. No me pagan for preguntar."

Fase 1 (HP 45): Valek pelea melee with their martillo industrial. Cierra 1 gate per round as action of guarida. Libera steam in a pasillo aleatorio.
Fase 2 (HP 45 restantes): when low to the mitad of HP, apaga the luces. Pelea in darkness with advantage (knows their terrain). The PJs necesitan luz or sentidos mejorados.

Si falls: "Kest va to mandar more. Always manda more." Tiene a llave at the laboratorio.

DISENO ADAPTABLE DEL COMBATE CON VALEK

Valek is a mini-jefe of ENTORNO, not of stats. Their danger viene of controlar the subsuelo: gates, steam, darkness. Sin eso, is a type strong with a martillo. CON eso, is a pesadilla.

The DM must decide ANTES of the combat:
- Cuantas gates has Valek operativas? Base: 4. Si the PJs sabotearon the system of alarma, remain 2.
- Cuantos points of steam has? Base: 3 (liberan 1d4 fire in 1.5 m). Si the PJs purgaron the tuberias (Puzzle 7), only remains 1.
- Tiene darkness available? Si the PJs destruyeron the lamparas at the enter, Valek not can "apagar the luces" because already are apagadas — loses their mutacion of fase 2.

Preparacion of the group
Resultado

TACTICAS POR CLASE VS VALEK
Each class has a way of anular or explotar the ventajas of Valek.

IF THERE'S A Pewter Brute: when Valek cierra a gate, the Bruto can mantenerla abierta with brute force (STR DC 16, requiere use their action). While the sostiene, the group happens. Momento of "yo the aguanto, pasen".

3.6 Boss: Maelor per fases — The revelacion of the Mistborn

NOTA DM: is pelea has a arco narrativo additionally of mecanico. Maelor starts as a tecnico behind a maquina. When the maquina falla, reveals that ES Allomancer. And when all is derrumba, reveals that is NACIDO DE LA BRUMA. The sorpresa must escalar — not lo sueltes all at the start.

ENTORNO DEL LABORATORIO (combat)
Nodos of the aparato (Puzzle 8): 4 nodos distribuidos in the perimetro. Each uno alimenta to Maelor with power. Desactivarlos debilita at the boss. Orden correcto: Debil -> Media -> Fuerte -> Silenciosa. Si is equivocan: pulse of area (2d8 damage, DEX DC 14 for mitad). Deteccion: Bronze (Listen to Pulses DC 14) or Tin (Perception DC 15).
Mesas of laboratorio: cover media. Instrumentos as improvised weapons (1d4+DEX).
Jaulas: can abrirse (action) for liberar sujetos desorientados. Crean caos and bloquean lineas of tiro.
Cables of the aparato: cortarlos (AC 10, 5 HP each uno) reduce the efectividad of the nodos. Each cable cortado = -1 at the attack of Maelor.
Tanques of Kestium liquido: if is rompen (AC 10, 10 HP), generate charco of Kestium (terrain dangerous: 1d6 damage necrotico + CON DC 13 or nauseas 1 round).

CLARIFICACION DE HP: the HP of each fase are NUEVOS (is resetean at the cambiar of fase). Fase 1 (70) + Fase 2 (80) + Fase 3 (60) = 210 HP teoricos totales. In practica, Maelor colapsa before of agotar the HP of Fase 3 (ver turn 5+), like this that the PJs necesitan ~30-40 HP reales in Fase 3. Ajuste level 3: Fase 1 (50), Fase 2 (60), Fase 3 (40).

Fase 1 — The Aparato (HP 70, AC 16):
Maelor is conectado at the aparato central. The cables canalizan power of Kestium — NO Allomancy personal. The maquina amplifica the Kestium procesado and le da control of the nodos.
Attack: descarga technique +7 (1d8+4 + 1d6 Kestium) through the nodos.
1 action legendaria/turn: move a nodo to position adyacente or activar pulse menor (1d6 in area 1.5 m).
Comportamiento: metodico, frio. Apunta at the PJ more dangerous. Usa nodos as shield.
Dialogo: "Admiro the persistencia. But not entienden the escala of lo that interrumpen."
In is fase parece a tecnico, not a guerrero. The PJs that lo enfrentaron in the Acto 2 lo reconocen per the voz and the porte, but the not pelea igual — is behind a maquina.
Transicion: at the bajar of 70 HP, a PJ destruye the conexion main or desactiva 2+ nodos. The aparato is desestabiliza. Maelor SE ARRANCA the cables.

Fase 2 — The Allomancer (HP 80, AC 17):
Maelor is desconecta of the aparato and SE PARA. The PJs ven algo that not esperaban: is moves MAS fast. Golpea MAS strong. Their eyes have a brillo that not estaba before.
"Creen that necesito the maquina? The maquina era for the Kestium. Yo tengo mis own medios."

Quema Pewter: +2 at the damage melee, advantage in saves of STR/CON.
Quema Steel: can Empujar coins as attack ranged (bonus action, +7, 1d8+3 piercing, range 12 m) and empujar metal suelto hacia the PJs (DEX DC 14 or sueltan weapon/shield metallic).

Attack melee +8 (2d6+4, bludgeoning — punetazos with Pewter, brutal).
Pulse of Kestium residual each 2 turns: DC 15 DEX or 2d8 (the aparato sigue unstable, libera energia descontrolada).

MOMENTO CLAVE: if the PJs lo enfrentaron in the Acto 2:
"Espera... that is the type of the bridge! But that era a Steel Marksman, and ahora is quemando Pewter also..."
A Sabueso confirma: "Dos metals. This quemando DOS metals diferentes. Eso not deberia ser possible for a brumoso."
Si nadie lo enfrento in the Acto 2: the moment of confusion arrives igual when ven Pewter + Steel juntos. Cualquier PJ that conozca the Allomancy (INT DC 12) knows that eso NO is normal.

The nodos siguen active. Si the PJs desactivan 2+ nodos, the pulses of Kestium is detienen and Maelor loses the actions legendarias.
Transicion: at the bajar of 80 HP, Maelor loses the control. Grita. The aparato starts to colapsar.

Fase 3 — The Mistborn (HP 60, AC 15, OPCIONAL):
Skip if the group has less of 2 MR promedio, or 1 PJ inconsciente — Maelor falls at the end of Fase 2. The aparato explota and lo entierra. No does falta Fase 3 for that the pelea sea epica.

"NO! No after of all lo that sacrifique! PADRE, TE VOY To DEMOSTRAR QUE PUEDO!"

Maelor quema TODO. Sin control, without technique, puro panico and desesperacion.

Steel: lluvia of coins and fragmentos metallic each turn (bonus action, 1d6 piercing to all in 6 m, DEX DC 13 mitad). The mesas, instrumentos and cables exit volando.
Pewter: attacks furiosos +8, 2d8+4 bludgeoning. Is moves 12 m per turn. Golpea with all the body — not is technique, is brute force inyectada of panico.

PERO Maelor is quemando demasiado. Is a Mistborn SIN ENTRENAMIENTO quemando 5-6 metals to the time. Consecuencias per turn:
- Turno 1-2: dangerous. Attacks fuertes, multiples effects simultaneos. The PJs deberian estar asustados.
- Turno 3-4: fatigue. Pierde Pewter (already not bonus to damage). Pierde Tin (remains desorientado 1 round). Attack low to +6.

A Sabueso grita: "ES UN NACIDO DE LA BRUMA!" Momento of terror for all the table.
A Embaucador siente: "This roto per dentro. No can with all esto. Alguien lo FORZO to ser esto."
A Mundano ve: "Is is destruyendo to if same. Esto not is power — is autodestruccion."
A Acechador escucha: "Their huesos crujen. Their corazon va at the doble. This type is is matando with their own metals."

Al fall: "The metal not dies... padre... le dije that not podia..." Is desploma. The aparato is apaga with a zumbido descendente.

Si lo perdonan and lo dejan vivo: remains inconsciente, without reservas, quemado per dentro. Puede dar information about Lord Straff Kest and the planes imperiales of the Kestium. Is a PNJ roto that generates empatia more that odio.
Si lo matan: their body is relaja. The venas oscurecidas per the Kestium is aclaran. Parece more joven muerto that vivo. A PJ empatico deberia sentir that esto fue a tragedia, not a victoria.

DISENO ADAPTABLE DEL COMBATE CON MAELOR

Antes of the combat, the DM decide:
1. Cuantos nodos remain active: if the PJs investigaron well, 2 nodos are debilitados. Si not, the 4 are to pleno.
2. Tiene Maelor reservas of Kestium: if the Reloj of House Kest is lleno, if. Tiene +10 HP per fase and the pulses do +1d4 extra. Si the Reloj is low, Maelor empezo to procesar with prisa and has reservas inestables — the pulses can fallar (50% of chance of not activarse).
3. Cuanto dura the Fase 3: base 5 turns before of the colapso. Si the PJs are frescos (3+ MR promedio), 6 turns. Si are gastados (1 MR or less), 3 turns.

Economia of turns:
Fase 1 (4-5 rounds): the group is divide — 2 at the combat, 1-2 to the nodos, 1 at the environment. Sensacion: "Is strong but controlable."
Fase 2 (3-4 rounds): urgencia. The nodos brillan, Maelor quema dos metals. Sensacion: "Is complico. Is more that a tecnico."
Fase 3 (2-3 rounds reales): horror and compasion. Maelor quema all but is destruye. Sensacion: "Is a Mistborn... but is sufriendo."

3.8 Inquisidor and huida — Texto of lectura in voz high

"The door main of the laboratorio is dobla hacia adentro as if it were papel. The metal gime. And behind the door, in the mist that enters to raudales, ven a silueta. Alta. Delgada. Con clavos of acero where deberian estar the eyes. Is moves without prisa because not needs apurarse."

The Inquisidor not speaks. Respira. A sonido metallic, ritmico, that is siente in the pillar.

Mecanica: the Inquisidor da 1 step adelante and does a attack at the PJ more cercano: +12 to impactar, 4d8+6 damage. Si impacta, the PJ exits volando 3 m. Esto NO is a pelea. Is a demostracion.

Huida: the PJs must exit of the laboratorio, cruzar the subsuelo and arrive to the superficie. 3 rounds of escape with sabor narrativo.

Ronda 1 — TERROR: the Inquisidor enters. The PJs lo ven of front. Chequeo grupal DEX DC 12 for correr without tropezar with the escombros of the laboratorio. Narrativa: "Is moves without prisa. No needs apurarse." Si fallan: the Inquisidor arroja a trozo of the aparato that impacta the wall next to a PJ (without damage, but the mensaje is claro).

Ronda 2 — DESESPERACION: the group cruza the subsuelo. Escuchan METAL DOBLARSE behind ellos — the Inquisidor arranca gates as papel. Chequeo grupal STR DC 12 for maintain the ritmo cargando heridos/equipment. Si fallan: the Inquisidor aparece at the end of the corredor. A PJ lo ve. Hace UN attack of demostracion at the PJ more cercano: +12, 4d8+6. Si impacta, the PJ exits volando 3 m but can seguir corriendo (HP permitting). Si alguien cayo inconsciente before: another PJ must cargarlo (STR DC 10 additional).

Ronda 3 — ESPERANZA: ven the salida. Luz of luna, mist, aire frio. Chequeo grupal INT DC 12 for encontrar the ruta correcta in the caos of the fundicion destruida. Si fallan: the Inquisidor is to 6 m. Kaerin (if sobrevivio) cierra a gate detras of the group, dandoles the segundos that necesitan. Si Kaerin not is: a pilar falls between the group and the Inquisidor (DM fiat, a turn of gracia).

Each failure has consecuencia narrativa especifica, not only "is acerca". The terror must escalar but the esperanza always existe.

Si a PJ insiste in pelear: AC 20, +12 to impactar, 150 HP, regeneracion 10/turn. Is imbatible. The DM must dejarlo claro in 1 round: "Ves that your better golpe apenas lo does parpadear" and dar oportunidad of huir.

Si speaks with a Mundano: despectivo at the principio, luego curioso. "Sin metal, without power. As llegaste until aca?" Si le responden well: "Interesante. The that not depend of the metal are the unicos that podrian sobrevivir to lo that viene after." Pista about the peligros futuros of the Kestium.

Si speaks with a Bruto: respeto between pares. "Al less vos sabes pelear. The other are trucos and ranged."

Si speaks with a Embaucador: cerrado. "No me vas to convencer of nada. No tengo ambicion. Only tengo a trabajo."
Si speaks with a Mundano: a pausa, luego: "Sos skaa of verdad, not? Sin metal, without trucos. Respeto eso. But respeto not va to salvarte aca abajo."

PARTE II - Puzzles and desafios (with solution)
All include solution, clue, failure and version facil. Si your players are new, entrega the clue suave before of pedir muchas rolls. The idea is that resuelvan with logica and roleo, not only with dice.

Puzzle 1 - Compuertas of the canal (Acto 0)
Zona: Callejon / canal or entrada subterranea at the almacen
Escena: a reja with tres palancas oxidadas marcadas with simbolos gastados: a circulo (RETEN), a flecha hacia adentro (ENTRA) and a flecha hacia afuera (SUELTA).
Objetivo: Abrir the reja without hacer ruido.
Solucion: RETEN -> ENTRA -> SUELTA (primero is guarda presion, luego is carga, after is libera).
Pista narrativa: there is a cartel viejo of estibador in the wall with the dibujo of a esclusa: "Primero is guarda. Luego is llena. Despues is libera."
Pista mecanica: Investigation DC 12 reveals marcas of uso in the palancas in the orden correcto.
Fallo: ruido strong (the reja rechina), 2 Warehouse Guards investigan in 2 rounds. The reja is traba and needs STR DC 14 for abrirla to the fuerza.
Version facil: a PJ with Herramientas or Iron Puller note that a palanca has more grasa that the other — "that va primero".

Puzzle 2 - Libro of cargas truncado (Acto 0)
Zona: Oficina of the almacen, Muelle 7
Escena: a escritorio desordenado with a libro of cargas abierto. Filas of numeros, rutas, descripciones of carga and cantidad of escoltas.
Objetivo: Identificar the box real (the Kestium) between decenas of lineas of carga normal.
Solucion: Buscar the incongruencia: a carga marked as "chatarra industrial, 40kg" with ruta special directa (without paradas intermedias) and escolta of 6 guards. 40 kg of chatarra not justifica 6 guards.
Pista narrativa: "Nadie pone seis guards for chatarra of that peso."
Pista mecanica: Investigation DC 13 reveals that that line has tinta diferente (agregada after).
Fallo: lose time revisando boxes equivocadas (20 minutes of game). Llegan refuerzos (2 Dock Thugs).
Version facil: a PJ with experiencia of street (Mundano/Oficio) reconoce automatically that the escolta not has sentido.

Puzzle 3 - Sala preparada (Acto 1)
Zona: Deposito of the crew, street Morada
Escena: the PJs enter to the reunion. All parece normal... casi.
Objetivo: Detectar the emboscada before of that estalle.
Solucion: Unir 2-3 senales: barrels in position of cover + weapons escondidas + plata new + salida destrabada + members faltantes.
Pista narrativa: "Esto not parece a reunion: parece a trinchera."
Pista individual: Insight DC 13 note that a traidor is nervioso and evita mirar to Darven.
Fallo: the traidores actuan primero. Darven receives a golpe before of that the PJs puedan reaccionar.
Version facil: a Tin Lurcher with sentidos active note algo automatically: "The aire huele to oil of weapon fresco. Alguien limpio a filo does few." Additionally: a Embaucador of Zinc siente the codicia and culpa of the traidores (identifica to 1 traidor automatic). A Bronze Seeker cuenta the weapons escondidas per pulse metallic ("There is 6 hojas that not deberian estar aca"). A Mundane Specialist note the door destrabada ("Darven always the traba. Esto is a huida preparada").

Puzzle 4 - The llama and the polvo (Acto 2)
Zona: Taller of Torren, the experto in metals
Escena: Torren pone 3 muestras of the tamano of a coin about the table: a dorada, a gris azulada and a plateada opaca. Each a has propiedades diferentes at the calor.
Objetivo: Ganar the confianza of Torren eligiendo the shows segura for analizar.
Solucion: No there is answer unica. Torren evalua the razonamiento: "per that elegiste that?" The gris azulada is the more estable (not reacciona at the calor). The dorada is pura but reactiva. The plateada is falsa. Cualquier explicacion logica sirve.
Pista narrativa: Torren says "No busquen the more valiosa. Busquen the that not is moves." while acerca a llama to each a brevemente.
Pista mecanica: Investigation DC 14 or Arcana DC 13 note that the gris azulada not refleja the luz of the llama.
Fallo: Torren loses paciencia and da less information. Pide a favor (buscar a componente raro) before of speak more.
Version facil: a Bronze Seeker can "escuchar" cual shows has pulse metallic estable. Additionally: a Embaucador reads the microexpresiones of Torren for know cual shows lo pone nervioso ("Esquiva the mirada when miras the dorada — that is the peligrosa"). A Tin Lurcher detecta diferencia of temperatura between the muestras per calor residual ("The gris azulada is fria — not reacciona").

Puzzle 5 - Pasarelas falsas (Acto 2)
Zona: Canal subterraneo, Old Canal
Escena: the canal is bifurca. In each ramal there is catwalks of metal about the water. Algunas are viejas and oxidadas. Other brillan with metal new.
Objetivo: Cruzar without fall ni alertar to Silen.
Solucion: the catwalks viejas (oxidadas, desgastadas) are seguras. The new fueron puestas as trap and ceden after of 1 round.
Pista narrativa: "Lo new miente." — escrito with tiza in a wall humeda (lo dejo a mendigo that vive in the canal).
Pista mecanica: Perception DC 12 note that the catwalks new not have marcas of uso.
Fallo: the catwalk cede (DEX DC 13 for saltar to the another orilla), fall at the water = 1d6 damage + Stealth roto (Silen gains 1 round of preparacion).
Version facil: a Iron Puller siente that the catwalks new are only apoyadas, not atornilladas. "Esto is falls if soplamos strong."

Puzzle 6 - Ritmo of turns (Acto 3)
Zona: Planta main of the fundicion
Escena: the fundicion has a ciclo of produccion constante: the chains move carga, the furnaces rugen, the obreros cambian of sector. There is 1-2 rounds of "silencio" when the chain large does their ciclo.
Objetivo: Cruzar the planta without activar the alarma, sincronizandose with the ritmo of the fabrica.
Solucion: Observar 1-2 rounds and moverse when the chain large canta (the ruido cubre the steps).
Pista narrativa: a obrero le susurra to a PJ: "When canta the chain large, nadie escucha steps."
Pista mecanica: Perception DC 12 for identificar the patron of ciclo (each 3 turns, the chain large does a ruido that dura 1 turn).
Fallo: alguien the ve (sube the reloj of "House Kest is entera"). Encuentro extra with 2 Warehouse Guards.
Version facil: a Tin Lurcher identifica the patron automatically with sentidos active. Additionally: a Copper Smoker can crear a Nube of sonido that cubre the steps of the group (1 MR), eliminando the necesidad of sincronizarse. A Mundane Specialist with experiencia in fabricas reconoce the ciclo of produccion per instinto laboral ("The chain large suena each 30 segundos. Esperamos to that cante and cruzamos").

Puzzle 7 - Vapor in tres levels (Acto 3)
Zona: Subsuelo, dominio of Valek
Escena: a sala of tuberias with 3 valvulas marcadas ALTO, MEDIO and BAJO. The acceso at the laboratorio is behind a door sellada per presion of steam.
Objetivo: Purgar the tuberias for despresurizar the door without causar a explosion.
Solucion: ALTO -> MEDIO -> BAJO (purgar of mayor to menor presion).
Pista narrativa: a tecnico garabateo "Nunca purgar from frio" in the wall with carbon. Frio = low presion.
Pista mecanica: a PJ with Herramientas or conocimiento tecnico (Investigation DC 13) ve that the manometros indicate that the presion high must exit primero.
Fallo: explosion of steam (2d6 fire in area 3x3 m, DEX DC 13 for mitad), difficult terrain per condensacion, Valek escucha and is prepara (cierra 2 gates preventivamente).
Version facil: a Mundano with craft tecnico (cerrajero, chatarrero) knows the answer per experiencia laboral. Additionally: a Bronze Seeker can "escuchar" the presion in each tuberia and determinar the orden correcto ("This has more fuerza. That has less. Purgamos of mayor to menor"). A Iron Puller siente the vibracion of the valvulas and detecta cual has more presion acumulada ("The of arriba tiembla. That primero").

Puzzle 8 - Nodos of the circulo (Acto 3)
Zona: Laboratorio of Maelor, during the boss fight
Escena: 4 nodos metallic distribuidos in the perimetro of the laboratorio, conectados at the aparato central of Kestium. Each uno pulsa with diferente intensidad.
Objetivo: Desactivar the nodos for debilitar to Maelor during the combat.
Solucion: Desactivarlos in orden of intensidad: Debil -> Media -> Fuerte -> Silenciosa (the retardada). The silenciosa is active 1 round after of ser tocada.
Pista mecanica: Listen to Pulses (DC 14) or Perception (DC 15) reveals that the intensidad of each nodo sugiere a orden. The nodo silencioso late desfasado (1 round after).
Pista narrativa: Maelor mira involuntariamente hacia the nodo more weak when siente that loses control. The PJs can notarlo with Insight DC 12.
Fallo: desactivar outside orden generates a pulse of Kestium in area (2d8 damage, DEX DC 14 for mitad). Maelor is beneficia (recovers 10 HP temporary).
Version facil: if cortaron at the less 2 cables before of the nodos, the secuencia is simplifica to 3 nodos (the weak is desactiva only).
