IA of enemies — as reaccionan to each class

Enemies inteligentes (Valek, Maelor, Rask, guards veteranos) ajustan their estrategia according to lo that ven. Enemies menores (matones) NO cambian — are brutos that flanquean and golpean.

When a enemy inteligente ve to a BRUTO quemar Pewter:
- Priorizan DISTANCIA. No pelean melee if can evitarlo.
- Usan cover and attacks ranged. Si not have arco, tiran objects.
- Valek: cierra gates for separar at the Bruto of the group. Divide and conquista.
- Maelor: apunta pulses of area at the Bruto for forzar Fatigue. "Is resistente. There is that agotarlo."

When a enemy inteligente ve to a TIRADOR:
- Priorizan COBERTURA and CIERRE of ranged. Intentan arrive to melee.
- Flanquean per rutas that cortan the line of tiro.
- Valek: apaga the luces especificamente for anular line of vision of the Tirador.
- Maelor: is moves between nodos that work as shield. Nunca is planta at the descubierto.

When a enemy inteligente ve to a ATRACTOR:
- Aseguran their weapons (agarran strong, usan correas). Saben that can perderlas.
- Evitan estar near metal suelto that pueda ser atraido hacia ellos.
- Valek: uses the gates as trap — if the Atractor abre a, Valek empuja algo to traves.
- Maelor: "Aleja your hands of mi aparato." Prioriza atacar at the Atractor because amenaza the nodos.

When a enemy inteligente ve to a ACECHADOR:
- Intentan crear RUIDO ambiental for saturar the sentidos (rompen things, gritan).
- A guard listo rolls a box at the floor before of moverse for cubrir the sonido of their steps.
- Valek: libera steam constantemente for crear interferencia sensorial.
- Maelor: active pulses sensoriales of low intensidad that cause dolor to sentidos mejorados (1d4 damage extra at the Acechador if has Tin encendido when receives a pulse).

When a enemy inteligente ve to a EMBAUCADOR:
- Resisten with VOLUNTAD pura. The veteranos know that existe the manipulacion emocional.
- Rask: "No me mires like this. Is lo that haces." WIS DC +2 for the Embaucador against Rask.
- Valek: immune to Irritar/Calmar in their sala (confianza total in their terrain). Fuera of their sala, vulnerable.
- Maelor conectado to nodos: resistance +4 to Zinc/Brass. Desconectado: vulnerable.

When a enemy inteligente ve to a APAGADOR:
- Entran in PANICO if depend of Allomancy. The Sabuesos of Kest huyen directamente.
- The that not usan Allomancy (matones, guards) not is ven afectados and ni lo notan.
- Valek: not depends of Allomancy, like this that the Nube not le importa directamente. But loses capability of detectar at the group with sensores metallic.
- Maelor: "Apaga that Nube! APAGALA!" The nodos conectados at the Apagador per less of 6 m is debilitan (-1 damage in pulses).

When a enemy inteligente ve to a SABUESO:
- Saben that not can esconderse. Intentan ABRUMAR with multiples fuentes of pulse.
- A guard inteligente prende a furnace or active maquinaria for crear "ruido metallic" that dificulta the lectura (DC +2 to Listen to Pulses).
- Valek: active all the valvulas to the time for crear interferencia masiva.
- Maelor: intrigado. "Podes escucharlo? The Kestium speaks. ESCUCHALO." Intenta convertir at the Sabueso in ally or at the less in distraccion fascinada.

When a enemy inteligente ve to a MUNDANO:
- Lo subestiman. Error fatal.
- "Is only a skaa without metal. Ocupense of the other." The matones lo ignoran and priorizan to the alomanticos.
- Esto le da at the Mundano advantage: happens desapercibido 1 round (advantage in primer attack or action of Improvised Resource without ser interrumpido).
- Valek: unico that not lo subestima. "The that not queman metal are the more peligrosos. No the perdas of vista."
- Maelor: despectivo. "Sin metal? Que haces aca?" Nunca lo prioriza. Error that the Mundano can explotar.

Condiciones of victoria alternativas per combat

No all the combates necesitan end with all the enemies to 0 HP. Aca are the resoluciones alternativas for CADA encuentro of the campaign:

Matones of the muelle (Acto 0):
- Victoria clasica: derrotarlos.
- Escape: correr. Are lentos, not persiguen more of 2 rounds if not ven the carga.
- Soborno: 10 coronas between all. "No vimos nada."
- Intimidation: if a PJ demuestra fuerza Allomantic obvia (Bruto quebrando algo, Tirador disparando at the floor), the matones huyen. Are cobardes pagados.

Guardias of the almacen (Acto 0):
- Victoria clasica: derrotarlos.
- Stealth total: if Never the ven, not there is combat. Posible with buena planificacion.
- Distraccion: crear ruido in another side (Tirador dispara to wall lejana, Embaucador aviva paranoia) for despejar the zone.
- Neutralizacion silenciosa: Bruto noquea uno, Atractor desarma at the another, Embaucador lo calma. Sin muertes.

Traidores in the deposito (Acto 1):
- Victoria clasica: derrotarlos.
- Negociacion parcial: entregar part of the Kestium to cambio of that is vayan. Duelen, but is option.
- Separar to Rask: if convencen to a traidor of dudar (Persuasion DC 16 or Embaucador), the traidores is rompen internamente. Pelea more short but with caos.
- Retirada tactica: abandonar the deposito with Darven and the Kestium. The traidores the persiguen, but is persecucion, not combat cerrado.

Silen in the canal (Acto 2):
- Victoria clasica: derrotarlo. Posible but PIERDE information critica — Silen dies without revelar all.
- Hablar: the better option. Silen QUIERE speak. Si lo dejan, da all the information.
- Agarre and presion: inmovilizarlo and forzar the revelacion. Funciona but is hostil. Silen coopera less.
- Dejarlo ir: is va and deja a mensaje escrito with the info. Menos dramatico but the group sigue avanzando.

Valek in the subsuelo (Acto 3):
- Victoria clasica: derrotarlo.
- Negociacion: Valek not is leal to Kest. Si le offer dejarlo ir + not destruir their subsuelo: "No voy to agradecerles. Only voy to irme." Is va with the llave.
- Evasion: if the group has grado sufficient of Stealth (DC 14 grupal), can pasar without that Valek the ubique.
- Trampa ambiental: activar the tuberias of steam as weapon (purgar deliberadamente in the sala of Valek). Damage ambiental that lo fuerza to retirarse without combat directo.

Maelor in the laboratorio (Acto 3):
- Victoria clasica: derrotarlo per fases.
- Desactivacion of the aparato: if the Mundano encuentra the interruptor Or the group desactiva all the nodos, Maelor remains indefenso. No necesitan matarlo — can atarlo e irse.
- Convencerlo: DIFICIL (DC 20 Persuasion, or DC 16 if mencionan that the Lord Ruler already mando a Inquisidor And Maelor loses the nodos). Si works, Maelor is rinde and les da their notes. "Si the Inquisidor viene per mi, not there is futuro of all formas."
- Colapso of the laboratorio: destruir 3+ tanks of Kestium liquido generates a colapso estructural. Maelor remains atrapado, the group huye. Dramatico, irreversible, but evita the boss fight complete. The cost: lose the notes of Maelor (information for temporada 2).

Inquisidor (Acto 3):
- NO has victoria clasica. Is imbatible.
- Huida: the unica option real.
- Distraccion: the Mundano can sacrificar a object valioso (the Kestium?) for atraer the atencion of the Inquisidor and gain time.
- Colapso estructural: if the group destruyo the fundicion per dentro, the escombros retrasan at the Inquisidor extra rounds.

Mutacion dinamica — when the fights cambian

Each combat has a "trigger" that cambia the situacion to mitad of pelea:

Almacen (Acto 0):
- Trigger: Ronda 3. The alarma alquimica is active (if not the desactivaron). Llegan 3 matones. The combat happens of "limpiar guards" to "escapar with the carga".
- Trigger alternativo: a PJ derriba the estantes (STR DC 14). The almacen is vuelve difficult terrain total. The guards not can moverse, but the PJs tampoco.

Deposito (Acto 1):
- Trigger: Ronda 3. Rask intenta huir with the carga. The pelea is divide: proteger to Darven or perseguir to Rask.
- Trigger emocional: if a PJ le grita algo personal to a traidor conocido, (Intimidation DC 14), ESE traidor duda 1 round (loses their turn). The other atacan with furia.
- Trigger ambiental: if the lampara of oil is rompe, the fire is expande. 2 rounds after, all the deposito arde. All must exit.

Subsuelo vs Valek (Acto 3):
- Trigger: round 4 or Valek low to mitad of HP (lo that pase primero). Apaga the luces. The combat happens of "pelea tactica" to "terror in darkness".
- Trigger: if the PJs abren all the gates that Valek cerro, Valek loses the advantage of terrain and cambia to agresion desesperada (+2 attack, -2 AC).
- Trigger social: if alguien le says "No you have that die per Kest", Valek rolls WIS DC 14. Si falla, duda 1 round and is can negociar.

Laboratorio vs Maelor (Acto 3):
- Trigger fase 1→2: Maelor low of 70 HP. Is arranca of the aparato, grita, the aparato is desestabiliza. Nodos start to brillar.
- Trigger fase 2→3: Maelor low of 80 HP new. Explosion parcial. Terreno cambia to escombros and fire.
- Trigger nodos: each nodo desactivado correctamente generates a effect visual dramatico (flash of luz violeta, zumbido descendente). Si desactivan 2+ nodos in fase 2, Maelor loses actions legendarias and grita incoherencias.
- Trigger Kaerin: at the start of fase 3 Or at the end of fase 2, Kaerin aparece. Their entrada cambia the dinamica of the combat (absorbe golpe, does damage to Maelor, luego huye).
- Trigger Inquisidor: after of derrotar to Maelor (or at the pasar 8 rounds totales in the laboratorio), the Inquisidor arrives. The combat ends INMEDIATAMENTE and begins the huida.

Closing and Recommended Table Use

Mostrale to the players only the Player's Guide and the Classes, without spoilers about Silen, Maelor, or puzzles.

As DM, prepare 2-3 plug-in scenes per session and use tension clocks so the world responds. The reloj of "House Kest is entera" is the more important: if is llena, the Acto 3 is significativamente more dificil.

Don't force routes: uses the estructura of 3 clues/options for that the players always puedan avanzar. Si a clue is cierra, another deberia abrirse.

If a session runs fast, estira with roleo, consecuencias and scenes sociales; not just with more enemies. The mejores sesiones of this modulo are the that the players recuerdan per a conversacion, not per a combat.

Write down SIEMPRE the interacciones of Silen with the PJs: that dijo, to quien miro, that gesto uso. That revelacion is uno of the pilares emocionales of the campaign. Si not the plantaste well, not va to funcionar.

Consejos for the environment: Never describas a sala vacia. Each place has objects, texturas, olores and posibilidades. The players van to attempt use lo that les des, like this that dales things that use: chains, barrels, steam, catwalks, darkness, oil, fire.

Tone end: Shadows over Fellise not is a historia of heroes. Is a historia of people that descubre that existe algo more large that their esquina of the world, and decide that hacer with that information. Algunos van to querer pelear. Other van to querer esconderse. Ambas options are validas.

Futuro: if the campaign works, the segunda temporada in Luthadel abre enormes posibilidades: the rebelion skaa, the corte of the Lord Ruler, more kandra, Inquisidores, and the descubrimiento of that the Kestium is algo that nadie deberia haber encontrado.

Reactividad of classes in table — consejos practicos

Antes of each session, revisa the classes of your table and marks the bloques SI HAY that apply. No you need memorizarlos: ten the page abierta and consultala when a class uses their ability in a scene relevante.

Si a player not active their momentos: dale a empujon narrativo. "Your instinto of Sabueso te says that algo pulsa of way rara" or "Con your sentidos active, notes algo that the rest not captan." The players new not always know CUANDO use their abilities; part of the rol of the DM is darles the oportunidad.

Si all the players are of the same class (or similar): esto is raro but possible. In that caso, the clues of ESA class is dan completas but the of other is offer through NPCs or rolls estandar. A table of 4 Brutos va to tener a experiencia very diferente to a table mixta — and ambas are validas.

Write down that descubre each class: at the end of each session, apunta that information obtuvo each PJ with their ability of class. Esto te allows conectar descubrimientos between sesiones and hacer that the players is sientan escuchados: "In the session pasada, your Sabueso detecto a pulse raro in Silen. Hoy, when entras to the fundicion, that pulse is POR TODAS PARTES."

The progresion of revelacion of Silen deberia ser like this:
- Acto 0: micro-clues sensoriales sutiles (the PJs notan algo but not know that).
- Acto 1: the clues is acumulan but the caos of the traicion the tapa.
- Acto 2: a PJ says "a moment..." and conecta the points. That is EL moment of the campaign.
Si nadie lo conecta per their cuenta, the revelacion of the section 2.5 lo confirma without that is sienta gratuita, because the semillas estaban plantadas.
